title: Unbecoming Humans
description:
This is the completely rewritten second edition of Unbecoming Humans. It's bigger, it's gayer, it's everything the first edition deserved to be. 

Please note that this rewrite is currently in progress. The end of the current rewritten chapters will be marked. 

With civilization on the brink of collapse,  Aria's parents built Eden to be the cradle of the next evolution of humanity, but survival at Eden is far from guaranteed. Aria has been little more than a puppet in her parents' games of genetic experimentation and control over the next iteration of humanity for almost as long as she can remember. 

When Aria meets Nima, the latest in a long line of victims lured to Eden by the promise of safety, a spark rekindles her cold heart. Aria can't sit idly by while Nima becomes her parents' next prey. The two must find a way to survive Eden's deadly experiments, or risk the greatest love they've ever known.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Brianna Kienitz (aka Rian Ó Rós), pronouns she/her, started out as an avid reader of lesbian fiction. When reading no longer sated her appetite, she turned to writing the stories she craved. Brianna believes a good story should make you feel every moment deeply, whether it be laughing until it hurts, crying yourself dry, or screaming with unbridled rage. Her Wattpad works have been widely read and have received multiple awards from the Wattpad community.

Her debut novel, Off Pitch, was named Wattpad LGBT Book of the Month in March 2017. Her young adult series, Unbecoming Humans, and her paranormal romance, Don't Call Me Jennifer, are ongoing.

Brianna lives in Montana, USA and enjoys LARPing, dancing, studying Irish culture, and taking on the world with her girlfriend. Love you, sport. 😋

title: You , Me And Sex (GirlXGirl)
description:
She stared at me intensely, I hold her hand firmly against mine. I leaned over her, pressing my lips softly against her. I pulled her even more closer by holding her waist with both my hands. I kept kissing her moving my lips against her and pulling her the closest i can. She just surrendered herself to me. I broke the kiss. Staring at her for a while, I pressed my forehead against her,feeling her hot and panting breath against my skin. It felt perfect. I whispered to her softly..'I love you and all I want is you.' She whispered back..'I love you too' and held me more closer to her. It felt surreal. All I wanted was the time to pause right there. 

Love cross all the boundaries, it is always to the extreme level without any limit. You, Me and all these emotions make up our world.

This is all about the love journey of Mia and Nicki , a bit sweet , dramatic , bitter, lovable and fairytale like.

I've been writing gay slash for a while now. Common themes in my stories are polygamy, slavery vs servitude, kidnapping/running away and family. Bit of a weird mix but I like trying to make people real instead of just a trope. I also have a bit of a bad habit of making people do good things even when they are supposed to be evil. 

Many of my stories are also up on fictionpress and da as well as lots of stories which aren't completed and are still being cleaned up. I'm trying to only post my completed stories here, or stories that are fairly long anyway. If you have any suggestions on how to improve or ideas for where stories can go just let me know. 

Thank you for reading.

Tumblr: edales-drabbles.tumblr.com.

title: The Merry Men Masquerade
description:
Ronan Hastings thought in lists. 

Depending on who you asked, this might be called a strategy, a shortcoming, a merit, or a crutch. Maybe even a coping mechanism. If he had to make a list to sum up his life at the moment, it would look something like this:

1. He was one of six in a group of thieves, and a good one at that.
2. He only had four friends in the world.
3.  He was probably in love, and it didn't feel good.
4. Stealing didn't feel too good anymore, either, but he didn't have anything else.
5. He was the type of person others cared for enough to make promises to, but never enough to keep them.
6. There was something about the newest member of their team that he couldn't bring himself to trust.

title: Begin Again | on hold
description:
Sunny Shelley wants a girlfriend, but she doesn't want to date.

She can't bear the awkward stages of getting to know someone only to find, after investing too much time, that they won't work out. She can't bear to let herself fall for a girl only to find out she's straight. She can't bear the thought of someone getting to know her and only then realising it wasn't worth the effort. It's not easy being a lesbian in 1999. If she could just wake up one day and be in a relationship, all those stages skipped, that would be ideal . No painful first dates, just a fully-fledged relationship with someone who already loves her exactly as she is.

Of course, she doesn't expect that to actually happen. But the universe works in mysterious ways. When Sunny speaks the her desire out loud one night after work, at the exact moment that she trips and loses her bus fare down the wishing well she walks past every day, she thinks nothing of it - until she wakes up in a strange flat with a woman she doesn't recognise. A woman who, according to her friends, has been her girlfriend for over a year.

Only when she has everything she asked for does Sunny realise that maybe she asked the wrong question, because what is the point of waking up a year into a relationship if she has no memory of it? It isn't easy. It's pretty fucking scary, actually, and she wants more than anything to go back to the nineties. But that isn't easy. She might just have to get used to this new life. Which means doing the one thing she wanted to avoid.

Sunny has a girlfriend. Now she has to get to know her.

© Elle Carrigan 2023
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Elle! I'm a 20-something lesbian writer of new adult romance - I love to write diverse love stories featuring queer, neurodivergent, and plus-sized protagonists. When I'm not working, you can find me in Starbucks either reading a book or writing one.

title: Reignite
description:
THIS IS A SEQUEL TO "You Drive Me Crazy. So Crazy." CHECK THAT OUT BEFORE THIS ONE!!

Adrian Gomez. After she found her father's dead body in her home, she vanished off the face of the earth. Only to be taken in by Demetrius Falcone. Leader of the Mafia. She left everything she loved and knew behind, including her beloved band, Overkill and her girlfriend, Taylor Scott. The only person who knows her whereabouts is her cousin, Elijah.

Taylor Scott has been reeling in the past 7 years wondering where Adrian could've gone. She went off to college, getting a degree in journalism. She's bugged Elijah daily asking for Adrian's whereabouts but to no avail. All Elijah tells her is that Adrian is okay. Taylor is on track to winning the Pulitzer Prize. But all that means nothing without Adrian.

Will they be able to reignite their lost flame?

"Do you hate me?" I ask timidly.

"Hell yes. I fucking hate you with my whole body and soul," She replies sternly.

"If you hate me, then why are your lips brushing against mine?" I reply back.

"Shut the fuck up," She says and pulls back.

title: Lilies for a Lifetime
description:
What do you know about Vincent Russell?

Well...most people don't know anything, considering he is an absolute closed book, which is ironic since his face is always shoved into an open one. If you happen to catch the attention of the grouch, there is no promise that he won't cuss you out or give a crap about you at first glance. The unbothered, quiet boy sure has a lot brewing on the inside from his uprising, but Vincent isn't the intimidating asshole everyone makes him out to be. 

...But he does have a weakness: that annoying kid that pried his way into his life called Hayden Williams.

So, who exactly is Hayden Williams?

He's the definition of a train wreck. Most people are surprised that the social butterfly can even keep his head attached to his body. With the chaotic energy he brings to every room, any night can end in spin the bottle, inappropriate jokes, and possible jail time...kidding (not really). However, there is depth to every party animal.

The remaining question is how on earth are these two best friends? Even better, how do these two become more than friends when their personalities conflict in every way possible?

Follow them through the years of their lives in 'Lilies for a Lifetime.'

**This is a spin-off of 'Flowers for Football.' It can be read as a stand-alone but many spoilers and scenes from the book will be mentioned**
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mondo Pastello | girlxgirl | Completed♕
description:
She was the type to stare herself in the mirror and see someone else stare back. Someone who was free and light, being able to spread her wings like an unbound angel. She was neither chained to Heaven nor Hell. Howbeit, no matter how far she reached into the mirror, she could never step through as her ball-and-chain presented itself in the form of a crown. 

She was a princess with two faces, desperately trying to have a sense of freedom outside of her royal obligations. She found it in the form of a weakness: a passion with another human being. Her love for him and ballet had kept her chin high; her crown not slipping from her pastel hair.

So why, why did it suddenly become so hard when a gothic gymnastic back-flipped into her life? Why were her heartstrings being tugged on by someone of her same gender? Why was it suddenly so difficult, so strenuous to keep living in her pastel world when this mysterious girl brought such bright colours with her?

TRIGGER WARNING: Mentions of sex, suicide and other mature themes will be contained within this book. Read at your own discretion.
Tous Droits Réservés

[COMPLETE] William reached out toward Orion's hands, wanting to feel his warmth, and never let go. "I visited you almost every day."

"I know," Orion grinned, "I know, Will."



                                                  ⭑⭑⭑

William Riller is an aspiring young astronomer going through his first breakup. Unable to make peace with his lover of eight years abandoning him for someone he had barely known, William plummets into a state of depression. William wanted to make Christian Hagets recognize the importance of what he had thrown away. 

Orion is a star, and whenever someone makes a wish he has the opportunity to come down from the sky in his human form.

On one humid, lucky night, William finds himself making a wish on a shooting star. 

Except, William had no idea what a blessing that star would prove to be.


⭑⭑⭑

title: Decisions and Mayhem | ✓
description:
Antonio Martinez has a hard time fitting in. For one, he wasn't born in the USA and as a result, has a funny accent the kids at school made fun of. New money was looked down on in his private school, and so the former top of the class had it out for him for stealing her spot.

Antonio didn't think things could get any worse until his mother asked the son of her long-term boyfriend to keep an eye on him and his siblings - in other words, become their permanent babysitter.

And that was how Antonio's social life was completely ruined.

title: The Broken Werewolves: The Human Mate (BxB)
description:
A werewolf having a human mate has been engraved in the history of the werewolves. Having a human mate has been forbidden ever since it happened before. The reason? The last werewolf who had a human mate turned against the werewolf kind, the reason why Hunters exist.
After meeting his mate, Marcus wants nothing but to claim his mate as his - but doing that will be a bit hard since one, his mate is human; two, it's forbidden; and three, it will be, for sure, the werewolves against him and his mate. But Marcus doesn't care about the laws and the history, he just wants his mate, and if taking off his title or position as the Guardian of the Werewolves, he will do so without any hesitation or reluctance. But what could possibly be the reason why the Good Goddess has given him a human mate? Surely there's a reason behind it, right?

As Marcus unfolds the story of the history while pursuing his human mate, things will be a bit messy. Faking his documents just to enter Norther High School is already risky, but Marcus will do anything to claim his mate as his, after all, he's the Guardian of the Werewolves, right? So everything will be okay. He hopes so.

Note: It's not necessary for you to read the other books as this can be read individually. Thank you.

title: His Other Half
description:
Jasper Simons is a boy who knows how cruel society can be. Jasper was injured in a car accident when he was 12 years old, he lost his Mother in the accident, and suffered brain damage. 6 years on, he has a severe stutter, suffers from seizures, memory loss, and needs a brace to help him walk. That is only what you can see. Now at the age of 18, the adoption centre can't keep him there any longer due to the shortage of beds. He can now access the money his mother left aside for him in her will. So Jasper decides it's time for a fresh start. 

Charles Maxwell is a 23 year old who has been running the family farm since his father passed away when Charles was just 19. He has a heart of stone, and an even tougher exterior. He lives for his farm. He doesn't have farmhands, just an elderly man named Jim, who lives on a neighbouring farm, who helps Charles out when in a time of need. Can someone break down his exterior? 

(BoyxBoy)

authorBio:
Hello Everyone, my name is Holly and I am A 27 year old single Mother of two little girls from Queensland, Australia.


I became a Mother at 15 years old, so after dedicating the last 8 years to my two Angels, I put my hobby and passion of writing on the back burner while I focused on raising my girls. Now that they are both in school, I have time on my hands to redevelop a relationship with writing.

I suffer from Post Traumatic Stress Disorder, so I like to include mental illness in my writing where possible, to help raise awareness and help others who are going through similar.

Don't hesitate to contact me about anything.





Please note: I will only be doing slow updates on my stories as being a Mum of two little ones takes up a lot of time, energy and attention! Thankyou for understanding.
-Holly

title: Brave Fear (boyxboy)
description:
All Zane knows is all he was ever told. He lived his life with zero complications and one hundred percent compliance. That is, until he becomes a weapon of mass destruction. Zane, born inside New Vancouver, knows nothing beyond the walls. So when his life takes an unexpected turn from the predictable, easy life he knows, his world flips upside down. He's forced into a human experiment and cursed with supernatural abilities. He encounters a gorgeous boy, and his attraction to him is overwhelming and new. He meets others like him, other subjects of the awful experiment, and finds out just how tangled in the web of lies he is.
 
Zane, trapped inside a facility designed to keep him in, must deal with his unfamiliar attraction and friendships he develops. He struggles to force his old life away and take charge of his new life, but New Vancouver's claws are sunk in far too deep. Thankfully, he doesn't have to. His friends formulate an escape plan and run into some strange and unexpected accomplices along the way. A few felonies and a couple missiles later, Zane and his friends are free of the barbaric walls of New Vancouver. As secrets are revealed and pasts are brought into the light, Zane begins to feel closer and closer to the people he calls his friends. But the orchestrator of the experiment is relentless and pursues them furiously wherever they deem to go. Zane questions the morality of his actions as he fights for what he believes is right and aims to avert total nuclear war. He is forced into the dangerous life of a biological weapon and is thrust into a situation where there is only one choice: face your past or claim your future. And Zane fears he'll choose wrong.

**Book 1 of The Paradox Trilogy** 

**Featured on @FreetheLGBT Other Worlds reading list**

**Featured on @DystopianApocalypse Rebellion reading list **

"Why you won't let a nigga get to know you ?" Sage questioned from behind her with her hand placed firmly on the door, stopping her dead in her tracks. 

Milan's heartbeat quickened by the second but thankfully her mouth didn't betray her the way her body surely was. 

"I don't want you to get to know me."





Milan always wanted to become a singer . She's had the opportunity held before her but the blood disorder that lies within her - sickle cell anemia, made it merely impossible for her at that moment but with age she's found new treatments and medications that ease her suffering enough for her to give it another shot. 

She'd recently dropped a song that went viral overnight and she was rising to fame quickly.

Milan and her bestie, Eunique jumped at the chance and moved to Atlanta, Georgia.

Wern Muller is always hungry.

Unfortunately, eating for Wern is not as easy as grabbing takeout. Wern can only feed on the traumatic memories of people and animals. It's an exhausting and thought-eroding experience, but Wern has to eat, or terrible things happen. To make it easier, Wern works in places where he is in close contact with traumatized individuals.

Haruto Sato makes Wern hungry. 

Sato, a user of the food bank where Wern works, is dripping in trauma. Wern can see the memories slither and hiss on his neck and shoulders. The memories whisper to Wern, enticing him like sauce on dumplings. 

 Haruto could quench Wern's hunger for a full year...

So why won't Wern feed on him?

---

[A Wattpad Editor's Pick.]
[An Open Novella Contest short-listed book.]

title: 𝐑𝐎𝐂𝐊 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃 𝐀𝐅𝐓𝐄𝐑 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃
description:
𝑾𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅𝒔 𝑨𝒑𝒂𝒓𝒕, 𝑯𝒆𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒔 𝑬𝒏𝒕𝒘𝒊𝒏𝒆𝒅

Fanyin's life was already complicated, but nothing could have prepared her for the ultimate plot twist: being thrown into alternate worlds by a system with a bee mascot. The catch? She has to complete tasks to get back home. But every world has a familiar face-his face-different bodies, same magnetic presence, pulling her in despite her best efforts to stay detached.

With every mission, Fanyin fights to keep her walls up, but piece by piece, she's falling for the soul inhabiting these different men. Sexy, hilarious, and brimming with chemistry, Fanyin's journey isn't just about the worlds she's thrown into. Who is behind the system, and what grand design is forcing her to complete these quests? Is there a deeper truth she's being led to discover, or is it all part of a cosmic game?

Get ready for a wild ride full of steamy moments, laugh-out-loud banter, and the question of whether love truly transcends worlds.
...

𝑩𝒆𝒆 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒆 𝑨𝒄𝒓𝒐𝒔𝒔 𝑾𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅𝒔

Fanyin was minding her own business-until a sassy bee system threw her into alternate realities with one goal: complete the missions or never make it home. Easy, right? Not when every world comes with a man who's too familiar. Different face, same vibes, and definitely too hot to ignore.

She's here to get in, do the job, and get out. But something about him keeps pulling her back in every world. Is it just coincidence, or is there a deeper reason behind these encounters? With snark, steam, and sparks flying, Fanyin must figure out the game-before her heart loses control.

Why her? Why him? And who's really pulling the strings? There's more at play than she thinks, and the answers might be closer than she realizes...

The cover image is sourced from Pinterest. All rights belong to the original creator. Unfortunately, I was unable to find their @ to credit them properly.

title: Romeo and Romeo
description:
Levi wasn't the kind of guy to go around kissing strangers, least of all the insufferable princes these events tended to attract. But something about Prince Charles made him feel a little stupid -- almost stupid enough to believe in love at first sight.

~~~

When Levi, the youngest prince of Arthur Island, is forced by his parents to attend a performative "good relations" ball in their rival country, he can't wait for the night to end. That is, until he meets Prince Charles, the charming heir to the Elizabethan throne. Love is in the air, so palpable they can't seem to escape it no matter how hard they try. As if navigating seventeen-year-old emotions isn't hard enough already, their families drop a bomb that will only make it harder:

In the name of permanent peace, Prince Charles is to marry Arthur's youngest royal.

No, not Levi. His twin sister, Amelia.

title: A Chocolate Kiss (B×B) [Book 1 of the Tantalizing Love Series]
description:
Honestly, this book is my very first bxb book so it sucks. I suggest yall read my 2nd or 3rd one instead of the same series which are much more well liked loll. Trust me😂



"So Anthony, can you explain why is there a fly in my coffee?" I smirked internally as he squirmed under my hard gaze.
  
  "I'm s-sorry sir.  I'll get my staff to c-change a new cup for you immediately and i-it will be on the house." He stammered out anxiously  he quickly shooed the waiter back into the kitchen.
  
  "Do you think this will stop me from making a complain?" His eyes widened in fear, his face almost paling.
  
  "Please don't, sir!" He pleaded, his voice increasing to a much higher pitch. 
  
  "So you raise your voice at your customers when you are at fault? " I quirked my eyebrow, pretending to be serious. if it was even possible, he paled even further, seemingly desperate to just solve this issue. 
  
  "How about this, you give me a kiss and I will let your cafe go. How about that?" His eyes widened...with what, I'm not sure but definitely not with fear.
  
  "I-I..."
  
  
  
  
  So that ^ is just an inside of what's going to happen.  Please read the story to find out what happens in the end.

Every living thing in the world fear him.

He is on top wanted level for the murders, rapes, kidnapping, gangwars, smuggling.

He is the biggest Gangster in town

He owns California.

And then there's me, A simple Guy living alone ,Who was having a Simple,quite and safe life until I met him.. 

None other than Fernando Jimenez.

While Im the simple Kennedy Wolfe.

Got into an arrange marriage with him . Without my consent...

But cant help to fall in love with his Cocky smile and Dark attitude.

As I got into his lifestyle,

I almost got traumatized but cant help to feel amazed as I feel myself falling for The Most Wanted Mafia Boss.

authorBio:
I've been writing gay slash for a while now. Common themes in my stories are polygamy, slavery vs servitude, kidnapping/running away and family. Bit of a weird mix but I like trying to make people real instead of just a trope. I also have a bit of a bad habit of making people do good things even when they are supposed to be evil. 

Many of my stories are also up on fictionpress and da as well as lots of stories which aren't completed and are still being cleaned up. I'm trying to only post my completed stories here, or stories that are fairly long anyway. If you have any suggestions on how to improve or ideas for where stories can go just let me know. 

Thank you for reading.

title: Something Special About You
description:
Xaviar Salvatore, a typical unlikeable self-loathing mafia boss who was used to always having his way, finally met his match when a small business owner, Andy Jenkins, refused to give him the monthly payment the mafia demanded from the working class of the small city he controlled.

Couldn't take no for an answer, Xaviar destroyed Andy's hopes and dreams of the life he'd work long and hard to achieve, only to need his help afterward when Xaviar's life was slipping away in the young man's hands.

----------

A short romance story of how two souls met; one being unfortunate in luck, the other in love, only to realize they share similar feelings for each other.


11/11/2019

title: My Step-Brothers Don't Do Love
description:
A boy with a secret.

Step-brothers who hate him.

What could go wrong?

══════════

Jayden Lynch a 17 year old boy who had been through hell and back, bullied to his mother passing away. He had to move in with his dad who remarried a woman who has sons of her own. He didn't like changes and he didn't want a new family, but fate works in mysterious ways, because his step-brothers absolutely hated him. 

He has kept a secret away from everyone, making sure they don't find out that he's an age regressor. Something that meant a lot to him, he didn't want something that he loved to be turned against him. 

Though, what happens when his friends find out and most of all his new brothers? How will this all plan out for Jayden? Something he tried to keep hidden was now revealing itself to people - one by one.

title: Urban Wolf | ✓
description:
Len has found his mate, but there's an unexpected obstacle.

He's recessive.

Len thought that he would always love Ahote, and all he had to do was grow up and claim him.

Before he could come of age and confess his feelings to the man he loved, a Siberian wolf from Russia had beat him to the task. Lost, confused, and not knowing how to handle his dreams being crushed, Len decides to pursue an architecture degree in Toronto to get away from his pack in Alberta when he turned eighteen.

That's where he met Adyen. His mate, and recessive werewolf that thinks he's a human.

title: TAN SKIN // A Baxter Radic Story
description:
🎶I miss your tan skin, your sweet smile, so good to me, so right🎶

Seventeen Year old Kaia Smith has always been a surfing prodigy. She has competed since she was six, along side Wren Radic in Queensland. They dominated every competition, but Kaia moved to Shorthaven with her parents last year. Leaving behind Kaia's entire life, surfing, Wren, and her boyfriend Baxter.

Kaia now is best friends with Poppy, and has officially forgotten about Wren and Baxter. Until they move to Shorthaven too, and Kaia realizes how Baxter was good for her. 

Baxter was the only person that understood her home life, surf life, and well school life. The thing is, Wren and Bax didn't call or text after Kaia moved. They blocked her on everything. 

What happens when they suddenly have to work together? Surf as a team again? When she sees Bax and Wren? And heck even becomes friends with Summer Tores? 

Read and find out!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Curse of Ferreus
description:
Running from his dark legacy, the werewolf hunter River must align with his enemy to protect himself from a vengeful pack and his own family; a low fantasy enemies to lovers story. 

River is a werewolf hunter, born into the esteemed, silver-lined legacy of the Ferreus Clan. It's not a life he wants and not a life he chooses for himself, and on the eve of his twenty-fifth birthday - on the cusp of an initiation ritual that will seal him into the coffin of his family's legacy forever - he runs. River stumbles upon the quiet town of Crescent Valley, a largely mundane, quaint place of old bookstores and pleasant cafés and peaceful nature walks. He also, through no fault of his own, stumbles onto a gruesome murder scene. Body torn apart, blood still warm, an odd symbol carved into the man's bare, scratched chest. He recognises the signs. Crescent Valley has a wild dog problem.

Thinking of his hard-won freedom and desperate for peace, River vows to himself- one last job. So he sets out on a mission to find the killer and put an end to them, if only so he can sleep without feeling the cool handle of a silver knife in his paranoid grip.

River soon becomes entangled in a feud between rival werewolf packs clawing for territory, and the alpha of the Crescent Moon pack, Rowan, is getting a little too close for comfort. 

In Crescent Valley, where monsters roam the streets, it is kill or be killed. Quite literally.

───── • ⋆⋅➶⋅⋆ • ─────
Status: Complete 
Story length: 95,000+ words

The cover image has been generated for this story using BingAI.

title: Jessie & Elizabeth (abandoned)
description:
Jessie Kawecki desperately needs a break. Her girlfriend broke up with her, she's sleeping on her brother's couch, and she's got maybe about forty dollars in her wallet. 

Still, when she gets offered the position of nanny to the three cheeky daughters of single mother Elizabeth Canfield, she hesitates. Closed-off and cold, Elizabeth is harder to handle than all of her kids together, and Jessie has no idea how long she can manage to put up with her. 

But she could really use the money, and she probably won't see that much of Elizabeth anyway. Why else would she need a nanny?


Started: December 16, 2020

authorBio:
I'm Erin, a 27-year-old translator from the Netherlands, and I've been writing since I was 7.

I'm a disabled lesbian, and most of my books feature disabled and/or queer characters. You can expect my books to be slow-burn romances.

Currently, I'm working on a Young Sheldon fanfic about Mary Cooper, who is definitely very straight and has no feelings whatsoever for her childhood best friend Jeanie Lucas. Ahem. (This story can be read even if you're unfamiliar with the show.)

My first completed novel, "Because You're Different", tells the story of June, a girl with cerebral palsy, who falls in love with her best friend Sam's older brother Nathan, but she wonders if anyone will ever love her back.
(This is a straight romance, written when comphet was still messing with my head).

title: °°°Even A Villain°°°[BL]
description:
It's terrifying. Waking up on a unfamiliar surrounding and realize along the way that I was reincarnated. Was I given a second chance of life? 

I couldn't help myself think why was I reborn. I died. I died, okay? Why need to bring me back alive? If I were to reincarnated, how I wish I could get a better life this time. But, my situation wasn't. My life turned out to be twisted and complicated. 

A few minutes of observation I was hit on a huge revelation, ladies and gentlemen. 

I was reincarnated as a fictional character! What the fvck?! And a villain at that! 

Hah. I felt like crying. 

I was reincarnated into a novel I once read in my first lifetime. Because of boredom and curiosity out of blue, I read it and guilty to be said I was hooked up by it. The novel was entitled 'Sovereignty'.

And unfortunately, I'm Evyterr Clause Lavinia Glastieve, a villain. Destined to die in the hands of heroes. 


***
Hello everyone this is my book. My first to be exact. It's a bl novel, so, if you're not a fan. Back off, sweethearts, this is not for you. I was really a huge fan of bl genre. Enjoy guys. May you support and pour your love on my story and my boys!!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Not about myself, but yours. You choose what's best for self, I do the same. Not being greedy, but something to yearn. Not being possessive or selfish, but having something to protect. A monster or not. Doesn't matter. I love, I protect, I sacrifice, I strive, I......

You? What are you? Like me? No?

With depression weighing him down he gives up until some who can give him a reason to live walks into his life.

title: The Curves Ahead - Wattpad Award Winner
description:
Watty Award winner for HQ Love. 

Curvy Evianna has it all - as the host of a number one talk show, she's adored by millions of Australian TV viewers, has a gorgeous co-star and cash to burn.  But the plus-sized role model is desperately lonely, battling the body issues that keep her isolated while lusting hopelessly over the delectable man beside her on screen.  

Realising she can't experience love until she learns to make peace with herself, Evi decides she needs to make some big changes to her life, leaving her safe chair behind the desk and embracing a new adventure.  She'll discover self-love, passion and a whole lot about herself as she explores what it really means to be beautiful on the inside.

title: I Do, I Do (mpreg)
description:
Henry McAdams is another college graduate with a hard past, one of betrayal, heartbreak and a near death experience. He is trying to make his life better but things could not get any more confusing. With a new boss that could make his panties drop with just a smile and a new job that is challenging enough as it is without the said boss trying to make it difficult by worming his way into Henry's heart, WILL THERE BE AN I DO.

Jace Cormack is the CEO of the biggest, most successful companies in the world, Cormack LTD, he is also in need of a personal assistant. Once he sets his eyes on Henry, he just knows that he has to have him. Henry has succeeded in doing what no other person has ever achieved and that is get his attention. Well he has got it and damn he is going to have him by whatever means necessary,Henry has unleashed the beast, he better be ready to handle it.

title: His Obsession (Werewolf|ManxMan|Mpreg) His Series: BOOK TWO (Will be rewritten)
description:
BOOK 2 from His Rejection

He wants me

I'm scared of him

He's obsessed with me

I want to run away far away from him but the urge to seek his comfort was still there. My past, my nightmares still haunt me and I'm afraid to let him in, he's my weakness, my light shining in my dark heart but I'm scared and trapped. 

Josh Evans is a beautiful young Beta twink. After the death of his father, he pasted his title down to Josh not to his older brother Devin. Josh and Devin never got along, with years of abuse from his older brother, Josh is afraid of older stronger men but he doesn't show it. He puts on a brave face and complete his job and ignore his fears. Josh is mateless and seeks love and comfort from his wolfs desires, after arriving in Australia for his nephews birthday party. He never expect to find his mate in such place, he was tall and strong which made Josh fear him. 

Josh is determine to advoid Steven Dean at all costs but Steven thinks otherwise. His natural possessive attitude makes Josh tremble in fear, but the urge to run into his arms was still there. Josh wants to fight his fears and be strong but with Devin lingering around it makes it impossible for Josh to move on. 


Copyright © 2014 by YasmineFernandez9984. All rights reserved. 


Warning!

This novel contains mature content and abuse. Please be adware that others would want to enjoy the book peacefully. If any problems please mail me through wattpad.

title: Hell's Pit (manxman|| #lgbtq)
description:
Venom finds his mate in the last place imaginable.

Hell's Pit.

A place many men enter and never leave alive. A place Venom once enjoyed; the violence and blood thick in the air. 

Ignorant of the barbaric way of gaining one's freedom. 

But alas, he has found his mate. 

A Shape shifter. 

An omega at that. 

One who has to fight for his freedom, for his very life.

**********************************
I don't know who I am. All I know is that I am slave. 

I've never had an identity until my mate gave me one.

Now I am Mareck. Mate of Venom, Prince of Realm Helliem. 

I finally found home with him. But I am still slave. 

Unless I kill every motherfucker entering Hell's Pit. 

With a little help from Venom's brothers I will be victorious. 

I must. 

Not only for my freedom but for my mate too. 

To finally belong. 

To finally be something other than omega. 

Something other than slave.

**********************************

Important
My books are written explicitly for a MATURE AUDIENCE 18 YEARS AND OLDER.  There will be some instances/scenes/suggestions of sexual acts, crude language and will portray gay relationships between males. If you do not enjoy stories of this nature please leave now. I will not condone/defend/accept any sort of attacks on my stories, my characters or myself.
It is well within your right to choose what type of entertainment you prefer but I will not be blamed for your curiosity.
Read at your own risk.

*********************************

This is the third book in The Nine Princes Of Hell Series. Each can be read as a stand alone but I'd advise you to read them.

title: The Wrong Mate (BoyxBoy)
description:
{Completed} *WATTYS 2018 LONGLIST* *Wattpad Featured Story - Oct 2017*

You shouldn't date before you've found your mate. 

It's what all the teenagers in the small town of Burlington are told. Kane is one of the only ones in his pack who didn't follow that advice. He never regretted his secret relationships, until the night the boy he loved found his true mate. 

However, Kane didn't have to be heartbroken for long because he found his mate that night too. The only catch? She's a girl, and Kane has never been into girls. Even though he feels something for Nora, it isn't love. 

As Kane struggles with his feelings, he meets Mason. Mason seems to be everything he's ever wanted in a mate, so how did he get stuck with Nora? 

That's what he's going to find out.

title: The Consequence of Provoking a Crazy Beauty [GL]
description:
The first time they met, Gu Siyu blocked Huo Junxian in the stairwell and whispered in her ear, "Be with me?"

When her pet passed away, she comforted her with sincere words, "Don't be sad, I can accompany you for a lifetime."

Huo Junxian knew she was lying to her and knew that she was a scumbag, but she still couldn't resist her sweet words.

However, what that woman didn't know was that she shouldn't have provoked the crazy Huo Junxian, and she shouldn't have said "I love you forever" to her.

The years to come cannot be avoided or escaped, even if she run or hide...

title: Accidental Amore
description:
When Payal Agarwal doesn't want to marry and avoid marrying Ranjeet, she lies, saying she's a lesbian. That's when the chaos begins in her life.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writing heals me. I try different ideas, some succeed, others fail, but I'll always keep discovering new paths.

Rom-com and philosophy are among my favorite genres.

I can learn so much from a single story and a rom-com has the magic to pull us out of a complicated world, bringing a smile to our faces and a tickle to our stomachs.

All my stories are queer because I feel there's still a lack of queer content out there.

Four Ongoing Queer Novels 🌈🥳

✨The Trouble Next Door: Life without feelings sounds peaceful, until it isn't. Returning home after four years, Divya's calm, drama-free world flips upside down thanks to Shraddha, a Guju tenant who's a constant source of irritation. 

👑The Royal Queen: A royal queer marriage drama, just for you. A princess is raised as a Man, and the people of the kingdom pressure her to get married. What will happen when this princess ends up marrying another princess? This chaos will unfold on the land of Rajasthan, in the village within the palace's inner chambers, Antahpur.

💍Accidental Amore: If you're into a Queer Indian marriage drama, then Accidental Amore! is just for you-prepare for an emotional rollercoaster!

title: WORTHLESS (BL)
description:
Jian Yu had always been a perfectionist, maybe he also bit of OCD-Obsessive Compulsive Disorder. He liked everything clean and in order. He needed to recheck everything before starting the job. 

Guard an Alpha, check.
Be a beta, check.
Gaining attention from rivalry Alpha family? Cross that out. 
Flirted by said Alpha? 

"My dear little Yu, please accept my love!" 

Gasp! 

"No! You are my client's fiancee!!"

"Not anymore!"
***
In this world, everyone is classified as Alpha, Beta, and Omega. Alpha served as the superior, the dominant one, while omega are generally lowest on the hierarchy. Regardless of gender, all omegas have the ability to carry offspring. 

Unlike Huang Jian Yu, a beta male, who can do neither. Beta are subordinate to Alpha and have a very low percentage in either giving offspring or carrying one. Even more, Beta can't form a soulbond. The population of Beta isn't even half of the population of Alpha and Omega, so little that no one actually paid attention to Betas. 

Jian Yu had believed that he would never find happiness as a Beta. Why search for the happiness you can't achieve? 

However, in the unexpected chaos, love bloomed. Jian Yu faces the increasing affection of two men who are inherently different from him: one an Alpha, another an Omega. Who will give the love Jianyu deserves?
***
A relationship that couldn't be predicted or guaranteed. Working on it together day by day could turn out to be a blessing in disguise. 

A story about trusting someone to share your fears with. A story about making each other's lives fuller. 

*Disclaimer*
*Original Cover© made by me!! Don't forget to follow me on ig @jjia_en

title: Jazz Red's Anomaly
description:
"I am the textbook definition of in love with you."

***
Jazz Red has had a life full of love; his parents taught him how to value himself, his siblings taught him how to stand up for what he believed in, and his family has taught him what it means to matter to people.

He has people in his corner, there for him and ready to have his back.

He knows that there are people who are less lucky than him-- with unaccepting parents and cruel siblings and a harsh past. He knows that when things go wrong, sometimes people are alone. Sometimes they fall apart, and there's no one else there to catch their shattered pieces.
But he isn't one of them.

He has friends and family that love him.

So why does he want more? Why does he-- even with all the joy his family gives him-- want a different type of love? He feels selfish, undeserving. Why did he have to feel so bad about being alone when he was surrounded by people who appreciated him? Why did he have to want, why did desire never leave him alone?

Well, he finds out when he meets Castor Rex, a quiet and extremely interesting football player, and that empty part in Jazz's heart feels a little bit bigger when he starts to realize Cas could fill it.

Cas sees him as a grinning, happy dork he has no chance with.
Jazz sees him as a adorable, grumpy jock that now, is his.

Castor wants to get through the school year as quietly as possible but with how loud Jazz loves, neither of them know if it's possible, and to make matters worse they're roommates for the rest of the year.

It's only a matter of time before they come together or fall apart.
***
Red's Series #4.
Crossover to @whoscountinganyways User Series.
Can be read as a stand alone.

This place, here, gives me all the happiness in the world. And I have no one else to thank but you Bakers for it.
As for my readers who read my other books and not the Baked series, the love is really not any less. I'm very glad that it's not just the popular ones that shine.
There are many people here, on Wattpad, that have made me the way I am and have helped me in my journey. But there is no way I can ever make up to them; only to press on and continue being who I am, write without regrets, and do my best. That way, I won't disappoint them.

It is very easy to be bad sometimes; to give in to the temptation of hurting others because you feel that the world is just so unfair to you. I guess true strength is when you  willingly choose not to do so; and perhaps wish them all the happiness in the world;


Even if you don't have it.




I am rather a people person. Message me, follow if you want to, I'll be happy to make new friends. ^^

title: Secrets and Things (MxM)
description:
Meet Nerovsky (Nero) Poston. He started working at MegCorp, a multi-alotofmoney dollar company. All he wants: live a low-key, simple life. 
But he can't because one, he has too many secrets that mess with his personal life, including his secret double life as a "justice" vigilante. Secondly, he somehow managed to get deeply entangled with his boss and finds himself falling for him, a person he feels he doesn't deserve

Meet Leonardo Covell. He is the owner of MegCorp and the owner of a lot of money. His life is relatively smooth sailing (eg. people constantly sucking up to him), which is an absolute bore. However, after a couple of unexpected meetings with a certain newbie, he finds himself wanting to unravel the mystery. Speaking of mystery, a certain midnight hero with a familiar aura has also caught his attention...
-
Meet Aiden Hendrix, Nero's best friend and partner in crime. He's a tech genius who's a decent-looking, playful social butterfly. But sometimes, it's all a mere facade to hide his own secrets and issues. However, after butting heads with a certain CEO, he finds his mask breaking and unintentionally revealing a side that he never wanted to shed light on for anyone.

Meet Erwin Fonzo, best friend of Leo and CEO of Nic and Co. He's a pro at faking his emotion and does so in order to make interactions less troublesome. He's considered cold due to his refusal of keeping people closer than an arm's length, but after a blue-haired man argues his way into his life, his arm's length shortens slowly as he unravels more about the man, including seeing a side of his that no one was ever meant to see.
-
A stereotypical romantic trope. Story's based around two couples. VERY slow burn.
-

authorBio:
Hey, I'm Mint!

I've been writing for as long as I can remember, but only recently did I actually work up the courage to share my stories on Tumblr. They were sweet, SFW monster love stories, lighthearted with happy endings, and I just had fun writing them.

When I posted them for the first time, I was astounded by the response, with so many people saying how much they loved my characters and writings. It was such an inspiration that I felt compelled to write even more.

Now, over a year later, MintsterMonsters has over 4000 followers on Tumblr, and I'm still amazed everyday that even one person wanted to read my silly sweet stories.

With the recent changes to policies on Tumblr, however, I'm uneasy about the prospect of continuing to post there, and have decided that moving here might work out better in the long run. At any rate, it could be a better platform for my writing anyway, so I thought I'd give it a shot!

It'll be a new start, but I'm kind of excited about it! I hope you'll join me!

***Oh, as a note, any story you find with an asterisk(*) in the title means it was originally a commission!

*** 'Seasonal' stories are scooted to the bottom of the works list after the holiday passes! Don't worry, they're still there! 'Completed' stories are just above those, so if an older story or collection disappears, it's probably down there!

<3 If you'd like to generally support my silly stories, I have a Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/monsterminty

title: Hollywood Politics {BoyxBoy}
description:
{Completed}

How do you keep a secret in Hollywood? 

Actor Max Stark, and Singer Ryan Connors know, they have been keeping their relationship a secret for over a year. 

Max is the bad boy, a serial dater, who has been dubbed 'The Hollywood Heartbreaker'. His world consists of dates with beautiful women and guest spots on television shows, but when no one is watching, he lets his walls down, and becomes the sweet guy who had always dreamed of a white picket fence type of life. 

Ryan is 'The Good Boy', who sings sweet love songs and hides his colourful personality behind endearing smiles and empty gestures. His relationship with Actress Claudia Grey allowed him to rise to the top, yet 'The Golden Couple' is anything but. He doesn't let people in easily and years of being told that the real him isn't enough to get to the top, have taken their toll. 

To the rest of the world, these boys don't even know each other, so when one of them wants to come clean and go public, what will happen?

Will their relationship survive the obstacles or will the politics of Hollywood get the best of them?

title: DESTINY'S LOVE
description:
Thanapon, a hardworking Omega who struggles to make ends meet while working long shifts as a secretary for Sailub Hemmawich his boss, is suddenly faced with a crushing burden-his parents' enormous debt.

Pon who was desperate seeks help from his billionaire boss, Sailub Hemmawich, a powerful and wealthy CEO. Sailub, a mysterious Alpha, is in need of a marriage arrangement to avoid being forced into a union by his father. Seizing the opportunity, Sailub offers Thanapon a deal: they'll marry for just one year, with Sailub covering his debt. In return, they'll part ways at the end of the contract-no strings attached, and certainly no falling in love.

However, after a reckless, passionate, and drunken night together, everything changes. Embarrassed and overwhelmed by what happened, Thanapon attempts to distance himself from Sailub. But before he can leave, he discovers he's pregnant with Sailub's child.

Now, the question lingers: Will Thanapon walk away before the contract is up, or will Sailub fight to keep Thanapon and their unborn child in his life?

title: Inflicting Pain (gxg)
description:
In a burst of unexpected courage, I pushed her away, finally breaking free from her magnetic hold. She laughed softly, a haunting sound that sent an uneasy flutter through me. "You could've just asked directly if you needed some good old-fashioned fucking, gorgeous. I can make a deal with you, alright?"

This side of her was completely different from the Quinn I had met at the party and casually talked to the cafeteria, the one who had seemed so friendly. Was she playing a role back then just to get closer to me? What was her game? Which version of Quinn was the real one?

"So that's why you were fascinated with my neck too, huh? Well, over my dead body, Quinn. I will never be part of your twisted pleasures." My frustration bubbled to the surface, fueling my need to escape the bathroom. I hurried toward the door, desperate to leave.

"I don't do dead bodies, Chloe," she called after me, her voice laced with mockery. "But if you change your mind, let me know. Besides, it looks like fate keeps bringing us together, doesn't it?" Her eyebrow arched playfully, and her lips curled into a smirk, her expression dark and taunting as I stepped into the hallway.

††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††

Quinn has long embraced the twisted shadows that shape her life - a world where pleasure comes at the cost of her unusual fetish. Indulging in her dark cravings has become second nature. But when she meets Chloe - confident, self-assured, and unwilling to bend to Quinn's allure - their worlds collide in unexpected ways. As Quinn's desires clash with Chloe's resistance, their lives become tangled in a chaotic web of passion and defiance, leaving them both questioning what they truly want from each other. In a push and pull of temptation and restraint, they become entangled in a dangerous dance, testing the limits of each other's boundaries and desires.

title: Hart and Hunter
description:
When a series of thefts escalates to murder, werewolf detective Dane Hunter and his fae partner, Julian Hart, must uncover the dark history of Spring Lakes before the past repeats itself and destroys them both. 

***** 

A year after starting a life together, private detectives Julian and Dane investigate a string of strange burglaries plaguing the shops in downtown Spring Lakes. It seems simple enough, until a murder, a disappearing body, and the discovery of strange tunnels beneath the streets take the case for a supernatural turn. 

The new detective in town, Rian Halloran, may hold the key to unlocking the town's dark past and its surprising connections to Julian. As Julian learns more about the Fae side of his family history and Dane struggles with the responsibility of being an alpha, solving a mystery isn't the only thing at stake. 

Dane and Julian must reconcile past and present, navigate complicated families, and learn how to work together-all while stopping an incursion of strange creatures from the Fae underworld-if their partnership, and love, will survive.

title: Bound by Obsession
description:
Bound by Obsession follows Leonardo, a quiet café worker with a dark past he's determined to keep hidden. After years of running from his old life, he's focused solely on raising his two-year-old brother, Nickolas. But when Alekos and Zephyr, a powerful and dangerously alluring couple, take an intense interest in him, Leonardo's carefully crafted world begins to unravel.

Caught between the undeniable chemistry with Alekos and Zephyr and the weight of his secret, Leonardo must navigate the tension, desire, and emotional pull that threatens to expose everything he's worked so hard to hide.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: DxD: Empress of Desire
description:
In a universe where gods, devils, and angels walk among mortals, there exists one being beyond them all: Rimuru Tempest, the Empress of Desire. After conquering her own world and winning the hearts of its strongest allies and rivals alike, she sets her gaze upon a new realm-the chaotic yet alluring world of High School DxD. But this isn't a conquest for power or territory; Rimuru craves something more...intimate. Her goal is to capture the hearts and loyalty of DxD's mightiest women, bringing them under her seductive spell and forming an unbreakable bond with the most powerful beings in this new universe.

Rimuru enters the DxD world with a divine beauty, charisma, and strength that eclipse even the Biblical God, radiating an aura that captivates anyone who beholds her. With her irresistible allure, she draws the attention of Heaven's angels, the most devout and untouchable among them. Archangel Gabriel is among the first to fall under Rimuru's charm, seeing her as a living incarnation of God and finding herself pulled toward Rimuru in ways she never thought possible. Even Michael, Heaven's steadfast leader, cannot deny the influence she wields, though he harbors mixed feelings about her growing influence over his people.

Meanwhile, devils and fallen angels feel an odd mix of admiration and rivalry for this mysterious deity who brings both peace and desire wherever she goes. Rias Gremory and her peerage are drawn to Rimuru, fascinated by her wisdom, beauty, and almost playful seductiveness. Akeno, the queen of seduction herself, finds a surprising match in Rimuru, who can turn her charm against even the most guarded of hearts. The enigmatic dragon Ophis, too, finds herself captivated by Rimuru's strength and allure, feeling a rare kinship and awe that she's never known.

As Rimuru weaves her way through the factions of DxD, she embarks on a quest to unite the beings of this world under her banner-not through war, but through love and loyalty.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I love reading fanfictions, epecially stories about OP characters. I might try to create my own stories but im not going to be very great at writing without some exprience. As you can tell i have alot of fanfics where some only have the BIO or only 1 chapter keep in mind this does not mean i will just stop updating them. This just means that whenever i have an idea i want to do i will publish it and revise it at a later date. BE WARNED I DO USE CHAT GPT IT TAKES WAY TOO LONG WATCHING ALL THE EPISODES OF EACH SHOW AND FOLLOWING ALONG AFTER THE DIALOGUE. I try to use it as a guide only. If it seems like some of the wording in the story is ChatGPT like then thats because i usually get ChatGPT to write a draft then i change it up and expand from there.

title: Checkmate
description:
The second in the Clanmate series, this is Lio's story.

Lio. 

Strong. Smart. Sharp. Quiet. Unobtrusive. Unassuming. Hunter.

Lio has always stayed in the shadows. It is where he prefers to be - and it is where he hunts. One of Clan Intelligence's best, he is experienced at dealing with every kind of situation, every kind of trouble. He has no intention of ever being the main mover in the game, he is quite content with being a lesser player, with manoeuvring behind the scenes.

And then his mate bursts into his life.

Changing the game. 


**This is NOT a sequel to 'Hide and Seek', but is set in the same world and shares some characters introduced in that book. Reading H&S will give context to this and will make reading this easier, but it's not absolutely necessary.

title: Dynasties And  love [ Completed]
description:
Story Description:

Maximilian Ashbroune, the spare prince of Ashburn, feels trapped in a life he never chose. While his role as a prince should be one of pride and privilege, Max's greatest struggle is accepting the pressure of his destiny-marriage to a man who will eventually become king. Society expects him to be delicate, soft-spoken, and more feminine because of his attraction to men, but Max defies these expectations. He is a mix of both masculine and feminine traits, unapologetically himself, even though the idea of marriage and everything tied to his sexuality scares him.

On the other hand, Alexandros Vareli, the crown prince of Vireli, is comfortable in his role as the future king. Loved by his people and secure in his future, Alex sees marriage as an opportunity for love-a chance to find someone he truly connects with. Even though royal marriages are often arranged by family, Alex believes that love can grow between two people, and he is open to the idea of an arranged marriage, provided there is mutual respect and affection.

When their paths cross, both Max and Alex find themselves at a crossroads in their lives. Max's fear of marriage clashes with his growing attraction to Alex, and Alex sees in Max the kind of person he could share his life with. The story follows their journey as they navigate the complexities of their royal duties, their feelings for each other, and the expectations that come with being heirs to their respective kingdoms. Will they find the courage to embrace love, or will their fears and obligations tear them apart?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Drive By [BoyXBoy]
description:
8:15 every morning I see him.

In his big red Ford truck, with his window down just enough to let the smoke from his cigarette go through. His sunglasses on as he mumbles the words to whatever song is on the radio while driving said truck with one hand. Possibly with the help of a knee. 

I see this, every weekday morning. The same time, the same place.

Am I crazy for thinking about him? Or thinking about us? Or is this just a fantasy that'll never see the light of day?

title: Obscure Motives
description:
Grayson Hughes is the CEO of his record label, GH Records. His company has signed a lot of successful artists that have declared him the best at what he does. At the age of 28, he has created iconic music and made himself a billionaire. He is a player at heart and everyone who gets involved with him, knows he will never settle down.  

That is Until he meets the lovable but stubborn Terry Baker. 

Terry Baker 25, is a college student who is one year from graduating and becoming a lawyer. He is not afraid to speak his mind and defend himself. Between working,  going to school and dating his workaholic boyfriend, he doesn't have time for playing games.  

But when he becomes stranded in the middle of nowhere, and needs help from Grayson, will he catch something more than just a ride? And is Grayson being nice just to help out or does he have certain Obscure Motives in mind?

My sunshines, Papa and Ruka-san @4510471P ℒℴѵℯℒᎥѵℯ


This place, here, gives me all the happiness in the world. And I have no one else to thank but you Bakers for it.
As for my readers who read my other books and not the Baked series, the love is really not any less. I'm very glad that it's not just the popular ones that shine.
There are many people here, on Wattpad, that have made me the way I am and have helped me in my journey. But there is no way I can ever make up to them; only to press on and continue being who I am, write without regrets, and do my best. That way, I won't disappoint them.

It is very easy to be bad sometimes; to give in to the temptation of hurting others because you feel that the world is just so unfair to you. I guess true strength is when you  willingly choose not to do so; and perhaps wish them all the happiness in the world;


Even if you don't have it.




I am rather a people person. Message me, follow if you want to, I'll be happy to make new friends. ^^




Love comes with stupidity. So does bravery. And many other good things in life.

title: Double Journey ( A Round Trip To Love)
description:
This story is about the love story of Cheng Yi Chen and also Cheng Yi Cheng. First three Vol and the last two Vol is about Cheng Yi Chen, another two Vol is about Cheng Yi Cheng.

Story regarding Xiao Chen and Lu Feng, is based on Xiao Chen Point Of View (Xiao Chen POV)
Story regarding Yi Cheng and Qin Lang, is based on Qin Lang Point of View (Qin Lang POV)

The blind fortunate-teller that is at the alley said to me "your love road are destined with full of obstacle, forever will entangled with men, and is full of tragic issues."

I put the left over soft drink handed to him, slapped my my butt and went away "Hey, you haven't give me money yet!" The blind man still shouting at far behind.

Is there any mistake? Even I am a man or a woman also cannot differentiate, still dare to ask for money? Never destroy your stall is consider I am in a good mood. These is one of the main content that I wrote during high school grade one, teacher commented "It is at the certain extent that is exposed hypocrisy of feudal superstition, but the word that use is too vulgar."

I am now sitting inside the train station, face swollen like a pig, clothes being untidy, hands empty, think back the fortune-telling blind words, regretted using soft drink to send him away.

Supposedly give him lot of money, unfortunately till today I am still a fool, still entangled with men, but not alert what kind of bad fortunate I will faced.

Content:-
1.Vol 1 - Long Way Home
2.Vol 2- Way of Differences
3.Vol 3- If
4.Vol 4- Winding Path
5.Vol 5-The Far Shore
6.Vol 6- Tenant
7.Extras- Simple Era + A while of greedy for happiness.

FengChen:- Vol 1, Vol 2, Vol 3, Vol 6 and Extras
LangCheng:- Vol 4, Vol 5

title: Loving The Lost
description:
Everything hurt.  The pain the flooded over my entire body.  I could feel the blood seeping out and the bruises beginning to form as I just lay here on the kitchen floor.  Despite all this, the worst pain,  is feeling nothing.  Inside I feel so empty and Broken.  I cry but I don't even feel the emotion behind it.  I just feel like a void inside me,  never to be filled because there is nothing or no one to fill it with.  And I hate it.  She used to fill that void,  with her kindness and compassion that never once wavered,  with her smile that would light up my world.  But now she's gone,   And she left me in the darkness.

Asher Greyson lives in a small town called Hillwood grove with his father and brother.  It sound simple enough, but you when you look a little deeper you can see the truth.  Asher's father abuses him to no end,  he has suffered for the past three years with no escape from his hell. 

Jayson Walker's life was perfect.  He was the king of the school, he was rich,  and he was on the football team.  But that all changed when his father passes away and his mother moves into there old house in Hillwood Grove to start a new life.

What happens when the two boy cross paths?  Will Jason sacrifice his life for the small boy in the corner?  Will Asher forever be afraid of Jayson?  Will it end in tears of joy or pain?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello people who are bored enough to come across my profile.  I have two accounts, one where I write and one to read.  This one is where I write.
I have many books that are mostly just stories that are fed up living only in my head to annoy me in class 24/7.  As so I write the as a hobby, so apologies but don't expect me to have regular updates.  Im currently been hooked on working on the beginning of the story 'fight with all you've got, and don't drown.' And will be updating the first chapter soon to see how well it dose.  If you enjoyed 'loving the lost' which a lot of ppl seemed to, then i think you'll like this one, especially since my writing has gotten significantly better *thank god*.

As the boundaries between friendship and something more begin to blur, things seem to simplify... or so Jay thinks. Mason receives news that could either tear them apart or bring them closer than ever.

title: Love and Other Wicked Things
description:
One story, multiple ways to enjoy it! Read the bestselling published book right here as Wattpad Original or experience the story as a Webcomic on WEBTOON. Dive into the world of love and magic, any way you like to read.

***
Sometimes love is the strongest magic of all

***

Nineteen-year-old Rhia Greenbrook has lived in the sleepy town of Oakriver in a house with three generations of witches her entire life. Rhia draws her magic from the earth and likes to spend her time amongst plants and nature. Her practice is gentle, sacred, and-per her family's tradition-secret.

New-to-town witch Valerie Morgan is looking for answers about her mother's disappearance from Oakriver seventeen years ago. Without her mother's guidance, Valerie has cultivated her fire magic on her own and she makes no effort to keep her powers hidden. Although Rhia is immediately annoyed by Valerie's blatant use of magic, she can't deny the instant magnetism between them.

But amidst their magical connection, a dark presence looms over Oakriver. Unsettling visions from Rhia's grandmother and dangerous sleepwalking episodes throw into question Valerie's past and what role her presence plays in the strange happenings. And as Valerie gets tangled up further into the darkness, it's up to Rhia to tap into the full potential of her power in order to save the town she loves and the girl she's fallen for.

title: The Void of a Future King (mxm)
description:
Prince Remiul has the perfect life. He is of the most royal bloodline and destined to be king when his father retires. His parents are all around lovely people and the most amazing mom and dad to him. 

He has the most beautiful, smart, proper wife that all the princes had been fighting for. She is also of the most royal bloodline, after Prince Remiuls, but that's not why they wedded. They wedded because they love each other.

After their honeymoon Princess Arabella was pregnant and had the most adorable  baby boy. Their lives had been complete and they were happy.

Except Prince Remiul couldn't help but feel that there was more to life than taking care of his son and training to be the next king. He wanted action, adventure, exploration and, mostly, passion. He wanted to be freed of all the responsibilities and have genuine fun, like laughing until his stomach hurt while running through a field.

That's why when he meets a carefree 19 year old boy who takes the prince on an adventure, he can't get enough of him. He starts to sneak around with him and lie to everyone about what he's doing. He knows it's wrong, but he can't stop.

So what happens when they share a mind blowing kiss? Between the stress of having a baby, having to train to be king, and figuring out his sexuality, will Prince Remiul crack under pressure? Or will he find his own happily- ever- after?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Seeing Red [✓]
description:
Book One [completed] 
Every year since his 2nd birthday, Ashley, Ash for short, has been losing the ability to see colors. Yellow on his ninth birthday, Violet on his 13th, Pink last year and so on and so on, like clockwork.
    
    
    
    Defeated and taking care of his cancer-stricken cat, diabetic mother, and caught in an never-ending job, he finally gets the chance to be an actual journalist, but he must first pass the interview with the billionaire CEO wearing the burning red suit.
    
    Reece Red, the new, young and wild CEO of R.E.D. NEWS CORP, a right-wing, republican and conservative news organization, is about as confused as anyone his age about how this thing works. When he sees Ash the first time, who challenges the him on his credentials, he instantly hates him. 
    
    But they end up finding that they need each other in more ways than one.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Kris, I'm 24, I'm black, and I write things sometimes.

College Kid by day.
Sleeping by Afternoon.
Awkward Superhero by Night.

Despite popular (and certainly  reasonable) belief, I am indeed male and the gayest straight one you might just ever meet. My friends say that I just haven't realized I like guys yet and he'll come soon and so I spend my nights waiting for Dylan O'Brien to climb through my window to read Jane Austen books to me. [update: turns out I'm gay as fuck]

I have a very noticeable writing style that usually involves pop culture references, idiot boys, twists and turns on all sides and gooey, boderline cheestastic dialogue.

Most of my books are cute, humorous love stories that celebrate clichés by twisting them in on themselves. You may projectile vomit from all the fluff. But like, fun projectile vomit.

I'm disgustingly nice, incredibly forgetful, extraordinarily lazy and inhumanly aloof. I also enjoy the occasional adverb.

I'm currently in college studying for a degree in Procrastination. I have the potential to go for the Masters I'm sure.

I'm  highly undependable but I try.



38,200 fans as of July 2018
Accum. Reads: 17,246,000+ as of July 2018)

Top Six Songs I've Ever Heard?

1. Bohemian Rhapsody 
2. Hey Jude
3. Ray of Light
4. Waterfalls
5. Band on the Run
6. Seven Wonders

Google Them.

Austen, Green, Rowell, Rowling, King.

So if you enjoy my reads or just like me because I'm awesome, fan me.
I'll love you until the next person does!

authorBio:
A mildly popular Wattpad writer, Sabrynabrooklynne puts her heart and soul into her writing. Once you take the plunge into one of her books, you'll  finish it and  want to read another.
You'll find she likes to intertwine her stories, setting several of them in the same area and time frame, causing events and characters to overlap.  It's a unique approach that has the potential to surprise and delight.

You won't be disappointed.

                              - Laindzy

===========

Welcome friends and stalkers. Be sure to leave comments on my stories as you read them. I truly want to know what you think.

Spent 7 years in South Korea and I still can't understand too many words in Korean beyond hello, thank you, you're welcome, and the names of a ton of foods, but I don't care, I LOVED Korea and can't wait to return someday!

You know what bugs me? --ghost readers. You never know what they thought of your work. You can only assume they hated it.

title: The Love Hack
description:
When freelance programmer Arty hacks into his own matchmaking app to pair himself with his crush, he enlists the reluctant help of his best friend Ben-whose feelings for Arty might run a little bit deeper than "just friends"-forcing him to confront whether true love is closer than expected.

Standalone in the Mismatched series

***

Arty Mavety believes love is a formula waiting to be solved, and he's determined to prove it by hacking into the matchmaking app he's developing to pair himself with his crush Leo, a neighborhood barista who barely knows Arty exists. Arty ropes in his best friend Ben Himmel, cashing in a favor-though they both know that Ben would've helped him anyway. Ben wants to be a good friend and support Arty's misguided mission, but there's one small problem-he's got long-buried feelings for Arty, and they're starting to bubble to the surface. 

As Arty's idealized romance with Leo threatens to unravel his friendship with Ben, he begins to realize true love can't be engineered. And sometimes, it's way closer than expected.

***

Weekly updates on Tuesdays. Wait & read for free, or unlock with coins-the choice is yours!

description:

She runs for hours, until she's positive he's gone, and finds herself deep in a forest. She can't take it, so she later passes out, only to be found by her savior.

Asher Rales, Alpha of his pack. His hard demeanor has everyone thinking he'll never find a mate, but he soon proves them wrong. title: The sick beauty is being targeted by paranoid evil spirits [Quick time travel]
description:
The sick beauty is kind, has an extremely beautiful face, but is terribly weak. When he wakes up, he crosses him and enters a small world. He will randomly lose one of the five senses, or experience some kind of strange feeling. The incurable disease system said that he was physically disabled and just died, so he could complete the task of being cannon fodder. Leaving the house, he ended up wandering the streets and died miserably. However, when Cisheng was getting ready to work with Li Gui's hair, he suddenly found that his shadow was covered with traces of thick ink. "He" came, and He was obsessed with him. Therefore, Cisheng was inexplicable After taking hundreds of millions of fortunes, the protagonist Gong Shou respected him very much, but his own life wished to be as good as the sky... It's just that his ears have always been bad. The brim is red, and the eyes are watery; Cisheng can't hear the love words whispered in his ear by the ghost king [New Wife] GET Forced to be sacrificed to a wealthy old bald man, he was tortured to death in the end. His death, the plot line that can successfully lead to the protagonist's attack and suffering, Ci Sheng was about to grab a knife and knock himself down, but he felt the blood slowly oozing from the blade and He chuckled in his ear, and the damp wind blew him Slight itching in the ear: "The baby can finally hear the sound... The baby with red eyes is so cute." "But baby, why did you remarry right after I died. I'm so angry..." --So, snap Suddenly, the old bald man died; the broken hut at home became a ten-mile mansion, and the protagonist Gong Shou disappeared without a trace. He was weeping uncontrollably, but he could feel more and more the indescribable but powerful and pale man's almost paranoid love for him...The originally weak and dying Cisheng did not die, but lived a life of luxury, because he was lingering, but he was not allowed to leave the system: QAQ, aren't you going to be cannonfodder Ci Sheng: ask him

description:
"I've never hated anyone before, but I must admit, you're the worst person I have ever met."
"I know."

     Vixen Taylor is exactly where he wants to be-- working aboard the most luxurious and expensive cruise ship in the world. He's done everything he can to achieve his dream, and there's no way he'll let anything or anyone get in the way.

Harrison Wallace is the spoiled rich Captain's son. He'Il do anything to make sure he's the center of attention. He has no clue what he's doing with his life, but what he does know is that he won't let a cruise ship waiter get the best of him.

But when their worlds collide, everything changes.

title: About Galaxy : The Worth of Million Stars
description:
"If you find it hard to defend your true self... I'll be your shield."

In the shimmering world of high fashion, 'Hong Yok' conceals her scarred face in the shadows, grappling not just with external imperfections but also with the internal scars of a past that haunts her-a haunting reality that fuels her struggle with PTSD. 

 Even if her own team believes she's unfit for the spotlight, destiny takes a twist when she measures up a royal lady in an aloha shirt - M.R. Netapsorn Ruthaithewin, or Lady Note. Rumors swirl that no designer has ever met her, and Hong Yok can't ignore the memories and mysteries in Note's eyes. 

What happened in their shared history, a decade ago? Hong Yok can't escape the suspicion that Note holds the key to unraveling the secrets behind her scar. Yet, the more she yearns to be near Note, the more she feels an unspoken protection-a shield against the sinister forces that lurk in the merciless corners of the fashion world. In this relentless pursuit of beauty, can Hong Yok navigate the complexities of her past and discover a love that transcends limitations?

title: Mary and Halley (sequel to When Mary Met Halley)
description:
(Sequel to When Mary Met Halley)

A year has passed since Mary and Halley fell in love over the hospital bed of the guy who was cheating on both of them, and they couldn't be happier. Together they feel able to conquer the world, with the help of their friends, a ragtag bunch of children and teens, and a crow with a crazy cat. Life is good and Mary wishes she could freeze time.

But things can't always be perfect, and mental health is a tricky thing. Even during the rough times, though, Mary knows who will always be by her side.

authorBio:
*WATTPAD CREATOR *

SKILLS:
1. Born to write
2. Loves writing
3. Can't stop writing

🌈 Welcome! Some things I am: autistic (like my kid❤️), queer, a lover of words, an extreme introvert, other things probably 🌈 she/her

I am also a Wattpad Creator and a Watty Award 2020 Winner! Thank you so much for all your support!!

DON'T MISS MY NEWEST GxG BOOK! https://www.wattpad.com/story/302574264-love-and-other-magical-adventures

I write about things you maybe wouldn't find in other books; life is not sugarcoated and I strive to be true to that. My characters struggle and suffer and have faults and question themselves. I'm a sucker for happy(ish) endings though.

All of my books are love stories on some level (or many levels), but none of them are typical. You will find slow-burning ships and runaway ships and surprise ones. Many best friendships, which can certainly be love stories in and of themselves.

Life is diverse and so are my books and characters. If you're looking for gxg especially, you're in the right place.

Thanks so much for reading! I LOVE comments! Don't hold back. Please don't ever read out of a sense of obligation.

I will totally delete any comments that are racist, homophobic, transphobic, contentious to me or other readers, trashing my characters, or otherwise not cool. One doesn't have to relate to the character to be polite. If you don't like the book for whatever reason, feel free to stop reading 🤗

You can now read When Mary Met Halley on YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family!

**Please do read the author note/warnings at the beginning of each book**

PLEASE DO NOT put my books on Goodreads or any other platforms!

title: BUILT TO BURN ／ apply-fic
description:
"You show up day after night with no purpose than to see me. You do understand the consequences your actions bear, do you not?"


Love, humanity's greatest gift and greatest curse.  Whether to cherish it or to discard it is in the beholder's choice.  But an unspoken rule whispers a warning to those who play its game:  you love your own, your kin, they whom you live among.   Once your adoration reaches for what it mustn't, it becomes sin; it devours the soul, it ravages the mind, and leaves nothing but devastation in its wake.


"But I don't believe you've ever denied me the opportunity, Castiel. And you do understand the consequences of your actions, don't you?"
