title: James and the Fey (Legends of Pinewood 3)
description:
Saving a captured fey lord with nobody but a winter fey who you're pretty sure hates you as your ally? James had definitely imagined a different holiday, but this is the one he's getting.  

***
After a humiliating experience involving a guy and a rejection, all anxious, nineteen-year-old James wanted was to disappear from his small, tight-knit community. He almost gets exactly what he wanted when he wanders too far into the woods and stumbles on an ancient prison-an ominous place that holds a powerful spring fey captive.

In the course of a night, James finds out that not only the supernatural is all real but also that they desperately need him. Only James possesses the magic to reach the spring fey's prison realm and free him.

Can he do it, however? James isn't so sure. Choosing him as a 'hero' sounded like a cruel joke, and most supernaturals didn't seem to have much faith, either.  With nobody expect a stern winter fey who was assigned to teach and protect him at his side, James has to save the spring fey against all odds. Somehow.

title: LOVE BEYOND... WORDS
description:
In a society painted by religious dogma, Ameril, a ray of sunshine with a dark secret, keeps the community abuzz. Beloved by the pastor and all the members of their town, she secretly yearns for a love that reflects her true colors. Then waltzes in Mrs. Fox, the community's enigmatic billionaire, through a chance encounter,  which disrupts the predictable status quo of Ameril's life. 

 A mysterious woman, with a past as rich as her pockets. Intrigued by Ameril's apparent indifference, Mrs. Fox finds herself drawn to this unconventional young woman who also possesses a vibrant spirit, something she has always yearn for secretly. The billionaire knowing what she wants decides to act on it.
However, her own complex family history will casts a shadow over their blossoming connection. 

Can love bloom in a world that demands uniformity? can their blossoming romance survive nosy families, hidden truths, and a society clinging to tradition? 

Or will they defy societal expectations and fight for their chance at happiness?

Dive into their fight for love in a world obsessed with conformity, where whispers turn into secrets, and hearts defy holy expectations.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
LOVE HAS NO RULES NEEDED
The world says no, but hearts say yes. I write stories where age is just a number, not a reason to stop love. Forget the boring black and white, love comes in a million colors and ways, just like us and the world.
We're all different, that's what makes it great! Young or old, hearts can connect in amazing ways.
Wattpad is a safe space to be you. Here, you'll find others who understand. You're not alone in loving who you love.
Don't be afraid to be different, it's your superpower! Loving someone older or younger(legal wise) is okay, it's just your heart following its own path.
This is for anyone who feels misunderstood. Fight for your love, for what makes you happy. Let your heart sing loud and proud!
With all my love,
A.W.

title: Daevari (Daevas -III-) ✔️
description:
Ari's life has been defined by isolation and distrust in the wake of  the chaos that befell humanity three hundred years ago. Haunted by a tumultuous past and driven by an instinct to stay hidden, he has kept the world at arm's length. But when a desperate plea for help pulls him back into the heart of the demonic conflict, he finds himself entangled in a realm he thought he had left behind.

Thrust into the demon-ruled society of Dantic, where Blood Demons and Greats hold sway and Daevas reign supreme, Ari must navigate a new world. As he delves deeper into the mysteries of demon society and the secrets that have long shaped his fate, he encounters adversaries born of old grievances and faces challenges that test the very core of his being.

In a world where survival hinges on more than just physical prowess, Ari must confront both external threats and the shadows within himself. The secrets he uncovers will propel him into a destiny where every choice comes with a cost.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Topping the Omega (Werewolf Story)
description:
Stephano had everything he ever wanted in life, except for a mate. After a decade of loneliness, he feels forsaken. Lost in a world where everybody meets their soulmate at 18, what will he do when presented with the shock of his life?

You know what they say... be careful what you wish for, you might just get the fight of your life. He wanted a mate, but could face a ruthless enemy instead.

---
Stephano Cortez is a third generation Beta of the Regency Falls pack, the largest werewolf pack in the country. He was raised to believe in the ideal that he'd meet his partner once he turned 18, but when that didn't happen he was thrown into a whirlwind that derailed his life for an entire decade.

Lost and forgotten, he felt abandoned by the Moon Goddess who was supposed to have paired him up. He threw himself into his work and dealt with the pain of being alone.

Little did he know, Stephano was not forgotten. There is a reason for everything.
But what he could never expect was to be presented with an unparalleled challenge that will shake him to the core and everything he has ever known.

Spinoff of "Topping the Alpha". Can be read as a standalone book.

WARNING: Contains gay sexual activities and brief mention of sexual assault.

title: Runt [ManxMan]
description:
He is a runt, an omega, and a lone wolf, no better than a rogue. After spending thirteen years alone in the woods, he's learned to take care of himself, and that packs are to be feared. 

Chase has acclimated well to pack life, though the loss of his little brother still weighs on him years later. When he discovers his brother may still be alive, he will do anything to get him back, but is there anything left to save?

Dax is the alpha of a large, powerful pack. All he cares about is what is best for his pack, so when his beta drags home a feral omega, he'd just as soon put the kid out of his misery as take him in. But how will he feel when he discovers this omega is like no other he has met before? What is his adopted brother's connection to this runt, and what are they running from? And is it worth putting his pack in danger to protect them?

title: Recall mxm
description:
Book 3 of Reverse. Can be read as a stand-alone. bxb
Being a male prostitute wasn't all it was cracked up to be. Every rake in England likely dreamed of the job, but Hollem could tell them that it wasn't all sex and sweet talk. He watched liars stalk through the doors at half past midnight, their heads held high, as if they weren't cheating on their wives. 

Young lads would come in during the early evening, drunk off their minds. Dealing with them was one of his main duties. They always thought that just because they had money, that they could have a go at any girl they wished. Well, that wasn't how his mistress's brothel was run. 

He had his own clients more often than one would think. Ladies of high prestige were common during the early hours of the morning, seeking a satiation that their husbands couldn't provide.
Ruined ladies also found their way to him, dreaming of a love that they could no longer find due to losing their womanhood before marriage. 
Rarely, he had male clients. Usually they were young lads about their twenties. They were always hesitant and quiet. Nervous. More than half of them were sent away with a short talk. The few he did take to bed were given what they had come for, but they weren't loved. That was an emotion Hollem believed to be untrue, and he considered nothing able to change his mind on that fact.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Blind Date (Completed)
description:
"Riley?" I asked and she looked up from her phone. One of her eyebrows was raised.

"Yes?" she asked and that confirmed it. 
I felt like I couldn't breathe. What the hell was going on here? 

"Hi, I am Ash. Short for Ashley, but please call me Ash" I said, extending my hand. I sounded wooden and choked, but I didn't know what else to do. Riley's mouth dropped open; she smiled nervously, and shook her head. We both realized what this meant. Our "boys" weren't late. Both our dates had been on time.

"Uh...No, I...I am looking for a man," she explained. 

I blushed. I felt so stupid.

title: (BL) His Male Queen
description:
Sheru was a simple man living in the outskirts of the city, selling flower baskets to the nobles who came to ride on boats. Being an orphan he was raised by his uncle and right after his death his aunt kicked him out of the house. He was a beautiful boy who gained alot of unnecessary attention by both men and women but he always escaped their wayward eyes.

No matter how much he hid his face from the unnecessary attention by the nobles, destiny cannot be changed. That's why he got the whole attention of the most powerful man in the country, a notorious monarch.

This story revolves around Sheru and his swoon worthy love , which changed the evil and blood thirsty Emperor into a lover who doted on him amidst all the strife and objections of the nobles and ministers.

title: Let Me Love You
description:
In her final year studying Criminal Psychology, Lisa Graham's life changes when she meets Rachel, a captivating woman who instantly steals her heart. Rachel is not just a beautiful stranger-she's the best friend of Lisa's favorite professor and a widow with a son, grappling with her own pain. Determined to win Rachel's heart, Lisa embarks on an emotional journey, filled with tender moments and deep connections. However, as their relationship grows, hidden truths and past secrets emerge, threatening to tear them apart. Faced with these challenges, Lisa and Rachel must confront their realities and decide if their love is strong enough to overcome the obstacles in their way and achieve a happy ending

title: The bear shifter's  dominant neko                      『B』•『B』
description:
After he has been abandoned by his parents at only eight years old, Teddy was found by a mysterious man and brought into Cambodda, one of the biggest mafias into the shifters' world. Now at fourteen years old, shifting for the first time and realizing his inner animal is a bear, the boy is forced into training to become a bodyguard...and no mere bodyguard, the one supposed to protect the new leader of the Cambodda clan... Sirius Yahontov.



Shifters don't find their inner animals until they reach the age of fourteen. Being adopted by the leader of Cambodda clan when he was only seven, Sirius has never known what kind of shifters his parents were and what his animal was supposed to be. So when he finds out he is a Neko, it's plain obvious he is going to be ashamed, terrified and enraged. Especially when he finds out the boy he used to bully has a bear as an inner animal. So what better way of venting his frustration than starting to make Teddy's life a living hell? No weakling is supposed to have such a powerful inner animal anyways. 

      Sirius will make sure to show Teddy who the dominant really is.

title: Moonlit Fever
description:
When Nate attends the Elders' Ball, he unexpectedly encounters his rival and discovers they're fated mates, igniting a romantic relationship threatened by a dark prophecy that forbids their love.

Season 1 of Moonlit Fever

***

After causing the accidental death of a fellow werewolf, Nate Silverman is banished from his pack, but that doesn't stop him from breaking the rules and attending the Elders' Ball. There he crosses paths with rival alpha, Lucius Nightshade, and as their eyes lock, their souls are entwined by a force neither of them can deny-they're fated mates. But Lucius isn't who he seems, and has a hidden past that spells trouble. Threatened by a manipulative ex, the rise of the Wolf King, and a dark prophecy that forbids their union, their relationship is put to the test. And as tensions escalate, they must reveal their darkest secrets if they're to save their love. In a fight against fate, will their love prevail or will the prophecy come to pass, condemning them to a tragic end?

*****

"And what do you intend to do with me?" I let his name slide sensually off my tongue. "Perhaps you'd like to see me bent over this desk-"

"Don't finish that sentence." Lucius growled and moved closer, his leg slipping between mine, and he gently parted my knees. "Or I might be tempted."

"I'm not stopping you."

***

Weekly updates on Thursdays. Wait & read for free, or unlock with coins-the choice is yours!

title: A slow fall
description:
It was gradual. Lucas had always been there, but it was always as his brother's friend, not his own. Not really. When they began hanging out more, Caleb began realising there was a lot he never knew about the boy, and he began wanting to learn everything he could about him.  

With his brother's both having moved away for school, Caleb had the chance to learn more about Lucas than ever before. He didn't stop to think that that goes both ways, but maybe that's just what he needed. Maybe the love he sought was right there in front if him.

---

Find out how Caleb slowly falls into to despair and love. Is that not an oxymoron? Which emotion is stronger?

Seriously, it's a slow burn. Slow is in the title.

*This is a bxb that deals with sensitive themes and mature subjects. Take care.*

title: Twizzlers (MxMxM)
description:
Aaron Kingston believed in fate. No, he didn't just believe in it; he saw it. He saw the red strings of fate that connected soulmates to one another. He saw everyone's but his own, and that was okay. He didn't mind the surprise.

That is, he didn't mind until he found his mates - yes, mates - during the worst possible time. Because The Eye was coming for him and his kin. They were not going to pause for him to explain to his mates what made him...different. And that might take a while. A long while.

No, the enemy was growing impatient. So impatient, that they were willing to do anything. 

Anything.
~~~

title: Can I Lean On You | Finley & Harlyn #2
description:
Finley and Harlyn have been doing long distance for four months. But Finley is moving back to England, and they're both excited and nervous for what that means.

***

When Finley started his study abroad program at the beginning of the year, he never thought he'd be here - about to move back to England to finish out his degree and six months into a relationship with a beautiful boy. As with all good things in his life, he's worried it won't last and that something will happen to take this fragile happiness away.

Harlyn is in the same boat. He's never been in a relationship for this long before, and he's nervous he's going to screw it up just as he has in the past. As the term unfolds with new challenges and new feelings, he's even more unsure of his ability to be a good boyfriend - the type of boyfriend that Finley deserves.

Turns out, relationships are hard work. Will they be able to work through the troubles that come their way?

(This is a fully written book, and will update every Monday and Thursday.)

title: Far From Perfect
description:
Far From Perfect. 
That's what I am. 
It's what I've always been. 

How do I even begin to see myself as anything different when all I've ever been is the fat girl? 
I just want to be loved and accepted. It's all I've ever wanted. And all I've ever needed. 
I didn't think it was possible to have either of those until I met Nate Carter. 

Nate swooped into my life like a wrecking ball, rattling the very walls I built around myself to keep anyone from ever getting in. And without me realizing it, he knocked them all down one by one and did what no one was ever able to do. He taught me to see me. The real me. But will that be enough to keep what is growing between us alive?

title: Of Different Waters (boyxboy)
description:
Book 1 of The Depths Below trilogy.

When Ronan was thirteen and started giving people electrical shocks whenever he touched them, he asked his mom why it was happening. She immediately answered static electricity. When he tried to explain that he knew it wasn't static she changed her story saying instead that his father used him as a lightning rod during a bad storm and he happened to be hit by a strong bolt.
And for some reason he believed that story...
Now... nine years later, he's found he can do more than shock people.  He can talk to fish.  He thought about asking his mother how something like that could be possible, but he doesn't think he'd get a straight answer.  He's beginning to think she's keeping something from him.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I like to write for fun in my ever disappearing free time but I love reading more. 

I am extremely introverted.  I really do appreciate all of the comments and votes and everything on all of my stories, even if I can't bring myself to read most of them because of the certain amount of confrontation involved with reading somebody's thoughts on stories that I have written.

Most of the stories that I have posted on here existed long before I posted them  in notebooks that I kept as far back as late elementary school.

title: The Lone Survivor
description:
"You sure he's here?"

"Yeah, I'm sure. Can't you smell him? And haven't you heard about the young leopard shifter who's been spotted around these parts? Talk is that he's the lone survivor, and he's going to be ours"

~~~

My name is Fabian Davies, and I am a rogue leopard shifter. But it wasn't always this way.

I used to have a family, a leap. We all lived in a huge house in the forest together, and we were one of the strongest leaps of our kind. Now, I live alone, scared to let go of the past or venture far from the house that I used to call my  home. My leap disappeared five years ago, leaving me with nothing, no trace of where they went. Not even a note.

Zion and Chase. The twins who stumbled upon my home and changed my life for good. They seem to know something about my pack, but without knowing their intentions, how can I possibly trust them?

I am a rogue leopard shifter, cast aside by everyone I meet. I am the lone survivor.

title: Jonathan, The Size Master (G/T, BxB)
description:
Welcome in a world where the evolution of humans took very different terms according to living conditions and the environment. There are now 3 classes of humans: the borrowers, with a size up to 5 inches, humans with a size or 1 foot up to 8 feet tall, and finally the giants from 30 feet up to 50 feet tall. As it is in our world, there is a lot of discrimination or "sizism", as it is called. The societies try to work together but many times there are ups and downs.

Jonathan is a 20 year old human, 6'6" tall, with origins from the UK. Now he is attending university in the USA. There he has many friends but there is something missing: he wants a relationship with another human boy, but also has sexual desires with people of different sizes.

But, there is also something else that is special about him: he has the ability to change the size of any person, animal and object he wants. His ability started to manifest a couple of years ago and he hasn't shown it to anyone... But who knows what - or who - could change that.

Join him on his journey, as he meets Luke, one of his human classmates from the US, with his friend Ethan, a borrower that lives with Luke and attends their university. 

*Note: the story is still at early stages and everything is subject to change. I am realising chapters to get the feelings from people. Writing is a hobby for me, so please don't be super harsh 🥺*

title: The Proposal [18+]
description:
"I have a proposal for you." 

    It was just an ordinary day and I was sitting (as usually) on my favorite spot in the little café down the corner. I was drinking my no-milk-please and sugar induced cappuccino and reading my favourite book to kill my time before my next class in the local university. 
    And just like that, a woman - a beautiful woman - came and sat next to me. She smiled regally at me, showing me her pearly whites. I realized that I was practically gawking at her open-mouthed so I quickly shut my mouth and lowered my gaze to my lap. 
    "You're Vanessa, right?" she asked with her melodically sweet voice. I looked at her and slowly nodded. I was too stunned to reply because I didn't trust my voice. I didn't want her to consider me dumb. But who is she? Then I remembered; this was the woman I almost knocked over while I was running down the stairs yesterday. 
    Oh my God, is she going to sue me for ruining her dress or something?
    "My name is Lorena Night. Do you know who I am?" 
    "Y-yes," I stuttered. Holy shit! Her husband is probably the wealthiest man in the world. How does she know who I am? Am I in trouble?
    She nodded and continued, "I have a proposal for you," she stopped and waited till I nodded and acknowledged that I listen to her. Then she continued. 
    "I want you to become my husband's mistress." 


This story is rated R because of strong language and sexual content. I suggest that only 18+ read this. 

Copyright © 2020 Lila Ilak. All rights reserved.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello!

I am aware I haven't been very active on Wattpad in recent years. I am trying to change that. I did delete the original version of "The Proposal", but I am back and slowly editing it out. I no longer like the idea of writing it as a long book so the finished version probably won't have more than 10-12 chapters.

My new book "For the Glory of Asadea" is a little different, but I am very excited about writing it. Hopefully, I can stick with the schedule I made for myself.

I will soon start new short story, which will probably be published on its own, all in one chapter. I am not revealing the title just yet cause even I don't know at the moment *winky face*.

Please give it a read, vote and comment.


Thank you for your support,

title: Cohabitation
description:
It was not Peter's plan to fall for his best friend and her pretty boyfriend Aiden, when he knocked on Olivia's door bloody and looking for a fresh start, but things rarely turn out the way he wants them to.

------------------------
    "Can you throw me my bag? Or you know boxers and a shirt?" He yelled through the door once he had himself under control again.
    "Treasure, it seems there is a naked man in our shower," a voice said. It was a nice voice, deep and melodic and directly on the other side of the door.
    "It's Peter, would you grab his bag from the kitchen and hand it to him. I'm busy!" She replied.
    "Well, if it's Peter," the man said. Peter was pretty sure it was Aiden, the boyfriend she was living with. He sounded amused more than anything else. Peter listened to the noises outside the door, but he couldn't really hear Aiden's footsteps, so the knock a few moments later startled him so badly he cursed.
    "Were you listening?" Aiden asked. "I got your bag, you wanna open the door?"
    Peter took a breath and opened the door a crack, held out his hand for his bag. "Thanks."
    "I'm Aiden," he said as he handed the bag over.
    "I'm naked," Peter replied.

title: Heart of the Sky
description:
Brando Hallward is stuck on a transatlantic flight with his ex when he meets the suave Daxten Lowe. Maybe his luck is about to change.
 
                                                                      ***** 
 
Arriving desperately late for his flight, Brando Hallward discovers it's delayed but still manages to make a fool of himself in front of his ex. His luck changes when he scores a dinner with the suave Daxten Lowe. The two bond before climbing onto the same flight, where they continue their flirtation through the planes onboard messaging system. Brando is nervous, but soon Daxten brings him up to the first class lounge where their romance begins to blossom. However, dangerous blocks of turbulence rock the plane, causing injuries throughout it. Plus, Brando's ex is becoming increasingly jealous. Something is wrong, both with the plane and with Brando's life, but will these moments with Daxten be enough to make everything alright?

[[2018 Watty Award Winner]]

[[word count: 70,000-80,000 words]]

title: Taking the Leap
description:
Achilles is used to a life with rules and structure. Being attracted to men doesn't fit into what he considers structured. But he's used to burying things deep down, and this is just another item on the list. 

Xander crosses into his life, and he's completely outside the rules and the opposite of structure. Something about Xander makes Achilles' wolf sing, his blood jump and his heart soar, even if Xander is a man, even if he is a vampire. 

Innocuous meetings turn into a building attraction and Achilles wants to take the leap to be with Xander. Can he do it?

This is an entry for the open novella contest. 

Genre: MXM romance with a suggestion of magic, a dash a of angst and werewolf and vampire protagonists.

title: Unseen Bond
description:
In a world where soulmates are bound by fate, Sebastian, a stubborn, fiery omega, has spent his life hiding from the four most powerful alphas alive-men destined to be his mates. Defying every expectation of a weak and compliant omega, Sebastian conceals his nature and keeps his distance, determined to live on his terms, not theirs.

But the Big Four, each commanding an empire and with armies of loyal followers, are relentless. Cassian, Rhys, Adrien, and Lucas are driven by an unbreakable bond and a fierce possessiveness that only intensifies with every failed attempt to find him. Known as "The Omega Who Runs," Sebastian has become a public sensation, and the world watches as the powerful alphas close in.

Sebastian's pride and independence clash with the undeniable pull of his soulmates, leading to a dangerous game of cat and mouse. As the alphas close in, Sebastian realizes that hiding might not be enough-not against men who are prepared to give up everything to claim what is rightfully theirs.

The chase is on. But will Sebastian be able to keep his freedom, or will he find himself swept into a life he never wanted, with alphas who will do anything to keep him close?

title: Who's Texting Me? Oh, Just My Homicidal Stalker. boyxboy
description:
Like any other teenager, I wanted a damn break from school. Well, a murder on campus gave me that break. Sadly (for me, mostly) the murder had to do with my new... "friend": a homicidal, obsessive, cunning, and possessive stalker with an irritating sense of humor. How did I stumble onto the stalker of all stalkers? no. damn. clue. What I do know is that they text me obsessively, kill people around me, and threaten my friends and family if I throw away my phone or tell the cops. Well, they cover the categories of insane, murderous, and annoying, so I'm already screwed. But that doesn't mean I'm going down without a fight.

title: The Unwritten King
description:
Nicholas Lao Batista, editorial assistant at Will & Williamson Publishing, was not a naturally quiet person. Very few knew this, and he was not one of them. 

What he failed to say out loud, he wrote instead. It was something a starving artist would say, the kind he would talk shit on if he were loud and a hypocrite. Unfortunately for him, Nicholas was the starving artist, and his art was all he had: his only chance to be at the center of something. He never expected he would one day wind up literally at the center of it, plunging through the pages of an ancient journal into the story he wrote.

Except nothing was as intended, and with every passing day, it became harder and harder to tell bad from good. What Nicholas needed was a way home, but he found himself wanting something more - something to do with unwavering eyes and surprisingly gentle hands.

title: Fur high - a gay furry high school novel
description:
In the bustling halls of Fur High, everyone is just trying to figure out where they belong. For Jay, a quiet and artistic deer, high school has been an uphill battle. Between dodging bullies on the football team and sticking close to his tight-knit group of friends-a boisterous tiger, a cerebral wolf, a free-spirited hawk, and a calm cheetah -Jay is just trying to survive the chaos.

Sam, a confident and charismatic ginger shark, seems to have it all. As the captain of the football and swim teams, he's the golden boy of Fur High. But beneath his tough exterior lies a young man questioning everything he thought he knew about himself. When their paths cross in an unexpected way, Jay and Sam form a tentative connection that forces them both to confront their identities, fears, and desires.

As the two navigate secret hangouts, awkward movie nights, and moments of startling vulnerability, they discover that their growing friendship could mean something more. But in a school where labels and reputations rule, their bond is tested by peer pressure, personal doubts, and the lingering question of who they truly want to be.

"Fur High" is a heartfelt coming-of-age tale about finding yourself, defying expectations, and the beauty of connection in the most unlikely places. With its mix of humor, raw emotion, and memorable characters, this story captures the essence of growing up-and the courage it takes to let others see the real you.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I Mainly write Gay Furry fiction, but i've also dabbled with other genres, i write because there isn't anything out there in the style that I write about which is mainly focused around Dystopian worlds of Humans / Furry mixes.

I write for the story, there is usually mature scenes in most of my writing, the occasional curse word but nothing excessive.

writing is very subjective, and as a book geek i usually devour books in hours, I'd like to think i take my readers on a journey in everything i write but I'm my own worst critic therefore feedback, comments, messages are welcome, even if you just want me to read something you created :)

title: Daddy Dearest
description:

How could he possibly do that when the object of his affections lives under the same roof as him? The object being an older male, isn't all that bad once you've accepted the fact that once they're happy together, there's no need to interfere. 
      
Well for Jaden it's harder that, because no matter how he sees it, Blake Arons was his hero during the dark times, during the bad times, and the worse. All he wants is to be loved by Blake. title: Big bad Damsel
description:
"What are you gonna do? Call for help and cry?" He cooed. 

"Shut the fuck up!" Damsel shoved him away, only to be slammed back against the wall again.

"I'm a damsel in distress! Help! Help! Where's my Knight in shining Armour!" Darren mimicked a high-pitched girly voice as he held back his laughter, grinning from ear to ear. He couldn't help but lean down dangerously close to Damsel's face Smiling, causing the younger to scrunch up his nose in disgust in result. Sure, the boy was annoying, but the pure satisfaction of the reactions he could get from the younger set a bomb of butterflies to explode in Darren's stomach. 

"Darren I'm not in the mood- fuck off!" Damsel spat in his face, the spit landing on Darren's cheek.  Blood was rushing to Damsel's head, as he desperately tried to calm down whilst being trapped between the muscled arms resting on the wall behind him. He was flustered to say the least as his heart beat started thumping ever so loudly, Darren's nose just inches away from his.

Darren could only scoff as he wiped away the spit that landed on his cheek, flames boiling and evident in his eyes, yet he wasnt sure if it was anger, annoyance, or something else. He aggressively lifted damsel's gaze with a tight grip on the younger's chin. Dominance coated his next words as a smirk grew on Darren's face.

"But your knight's right here princess, where are you gonna run off to?" 

--------------

Damsel prince and Darren Knight. 

Ironic, right?

You wouldn't catch these two getting along even if they were locked up in a closet together; they'd just be trying to rip each-other's throats out. That's just how they were. They'd do any little thing to piss the other off, it didn't matter what, when, or how,they wanted a negative reaction out of the other and that was it.

Enemies. 

Both alphas, both hot-headed, both with anger issues. 

And both hated eachother.

They had far too many similarities.

[x]

title: The Broken Werewolves: The Alpha's Runaway Werewolf (BxB)
description:
For entire life, Leon Adler has already known who his mate is and he goes by the name Ethan Kennedy. For some unknown reason, Leon doesn't understand why he was paired with a guy instead of a girl - as it would be easier to build and start a family. He keeps blaming the Goddess for his unhappiness - and on his 18th birthday, he's bound to make a decision that will change his life forever: reject, or accept his mate.

Ethan Kennedy has always known he's special, but he doesn't know why or what made him special. His parents have been killed by rogues when he was still a child, and the gruesome event still replays in his head each time he closes his eyes. On his 18th birthday, he has to make a decision: stay where he feels safe, or runaway to keep his pack safe.

Note: This story is updated once or twice a week.

title: The Broken Werewolves: The Guardian (BxB)
description:
Perry Dames is not your usual Beta. He's the second in command, the Great Beta of the Great Alpha. Usually, you'd find him bullying others and need I tell you, Perry Dames is good at bullying. It's his hobby. But when his mate came along his life, there's this confusion brewing inside him. Why did the Good Goddess have to choose a male mate for him, when clearly, he doesn't like men at all? He has let go of his mate once, not bothering to run after him when he saw him in a car, probably going home or God knows where.
  
            Then there's Ean Davidson - Dave - Coffler, the bubbly, out-going, super friendly mate of Perry Dames, who comes prancing around and capturing Perry Dames's cold heart unknowingly. Cold and warm heart, if combined, what would be the outcome?
  
            After the what happened to Dave, after getting knocked by a rogue, it would take a long process for him to heal. Surely, his mate would help just by staying by his side, but what miracle would it be when a wolf comes inside Dave and takes over his body to get him healed?
  
  The Guardian; a defender, protector, or a keeper; a person who looks after and is legally responsible for someone who is unable to manage their own affairs.
  
  This is the second book of The Broken Werewolves series, continuing after the Forbidden Law.
  #3 - Part of the Extended Universe

title: To Share You (manxman)
description:
Donny has to move.
Because his mother gets a promotion in another country and he knows he can't leave her alone, he starts at a new university for his second year.
Donny doesn't really mind that, he has always been a really open minded person. He also doesn't care about the pack that he finds out lives close by.
Only when he finds his mate does he decide that yes, this might have actually been a positive change in his life.
But what if he suddenly finds out that his mate already has another mate?
What if that other mate looked just about as strong as him, so he can't just let him 'disappear'?
What if, after having to spend atrocious amounts of time together because of their shared mate, Donny actually enjoys the other male's company a lot more than his mate's?

title: Love Wins (lgbtq+)
description:
I disregard the stares that follow me toward that cottage on the edge of the village, their judging eyes boring into my back, my legs shaking harder with every step I take and the more whispers I hear on the wind. My knees threatening to buckle and take me down to the level they think I should be.

Was I really stupid for coming back here? 

Maybe-but I could not ignore their call for me. I could not overlook their need of me in this time. I never belonged until they took my mother and I in, kept her safe in their pack even after my shame and for that I would always come when they call.

This is too much to ask of me. They know it. I know it. Yet I've come.

title: The Quarantine Diary of Adam Garrett [mxm]
description:
Adam Garrett works from home, so quarantine doesn't affect him much, but his new roommate, Brad, is a high-energy guy who needs constant activity to stay sane. Adam is worried for how he'll cope, and worried that their fragile new-roommate relationship will break down under the pressure. As he helps Brad deal with lockdown, Brad slowly chips away at the walls Adam didn't even realize he had built up. 

A fun little romance story to make you smile during this time of uncertainty.

authorBio:
Hi! My name is Rebecca Christiansen. I'm an author, freelance writer, and Wattpad Creator from Vancouver, BC. My first book, MAYBE IN PARIS (Sky Pony Press) was released in 2017. I've been writing stories ever since I could form letters and have never been able to stop. In addition to writing, I also love reading, listening to thoughtful podcasts, and fangirling over One Direction.

authorBio:
A big hello to anyone reading this. Just a few things about if you’re interested. Firstly, I live all the way down in Australia, so I use Australian dictionary, hence there might be a few spelling differences like ‘mum’ instead of ‘mom’ :3 Don’t pay too much attention to that.

Secondly, I write exclusively male dominated stories and Yaoi/boyslove/Slash/MxM/BoyxBoy/LGBT or whatever you wish to call it. I also like using women characters for the bad guy's role (for something completely different as the 'badguy' of most stories are always men. It's gets a bit boring after a while). I don’t really read ‘het’ stories as I find them a bit boring.

There is no set genre that I specialise in - it all depends on the inspiration I am struck with. So, anything goes, really. But I must admit, I adore the fantasy genre. Stories to do with magic is something I find great joy in <3

I also must point out that I suffer from a condition called Fibromyalgia and also chronic migraines/headaches. I not telling you for sympathy points, but as a matter of fact as there will be periods in my life where I will seem to ‘disappear’ from the face of the earth. I don’t mean to, but if I do, I will probably be suffering from a relapse. Stress is a huge factor in that, so please don’t pressure me to update a story or to write something. It’ll only make me feel worse.

So, if you send me a message and you don’t get an immediate reply; please don’t feel as if I am ignoring you in anyway. I wouldn’t do that. And don’t be afraid to talk to me. I am a rather spiritually positive person and I believe in karma. I’m also pretty good at giving gentle words of advice.

If you have an account with FictionPress, you can find me there as well;
http://www.fictionpress.com/u/738529/Exotic_Waterlily

-

I really do appreciate receiving comments and messages, even though I may not respond to all of them. I just want to let you know that I really do appreciate everything~ <3

title: What it Means to Have You
description:
He should still be alpha, still have his longevity, and still have his pack. But life finally decided to deal Kine Royal a much-deserved blow. He lost his alpha longevity and strength to Tanner, the new top wolf of his former ancient pack after a fight that should have left him dead. Thankfully, he had managed to retain just enough of his drained abilities to keep his life, leaving him to crawl from a shallow, snow-covered grave and slink away soaked in blood with a score of broken bones.

Once he left his territory Kine found himself completely alone for the first time in his selfish, murderous life. He struggled to remain alive throughout a harsh winter, wishing for relief, if not from the itchiness his numbing injuries caused, then from his permanently rumbling stomach. Fortunately for him, karma decides to step in and send him some much needed help. Unfortunately, that help is in the form of a frustratingly annoying and overly affectionate black jaguar.

authorBio:
A mildly popular Wattpad writer, Sabrynabrooklynne puts her heart and soul into her writing. Once you take the plunge into one of her books, you'll  finish it and  want to read another.
You'll find she likes to intertwine her stories, setting several of them in the same area and time frame, causing events and characters to overlap.  It's a unique approach that has the potential to surprise and delight.

You won't be disappointed.

                              - Laindzy

===========

Welcome friends and stalkers. Be sure to leave comments on my stories as you read them. I truly want to know what you think.

Spent 7 years in South Korea and I still can't understand too many words in Korean beyond hello, thank you, you're welcome, and the names of a ton of foods, but I don't care, I LOVED Korea and can't wait to return someday!

You know what bugs me? --ghost readers. You never know what they thought of your work. You can only assume they hated it.

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Kris, I'm 24, I'm black, and I write things sometimes.

College Kid by day.
Sleeping by Afternoon.
Awkward Superhero by Night.

Despite popular (and certainly  reasonable) belief, I am indeed male and the gayest straight one you might just ever meet. My friends say that I just haven't realized I like guys yet and he'll come soon and so I spend my nights waiting for Dylan O'Brien to climb through my window to read Jane Austen books to me. [update: turns out I'm gay as fuck]

I have a very noticeable writing style that usually involves pop culture references, idiot boys, twists and turns on all sides and gooey, boderline cheestastic dialogue.

Most of my books are cute, humorous love stories that celebrate clichés by twisting them in on themselves. You may projectile vomit from all the fluff. But like, fun projectile vomit.

I'm disgustingly nice, incredibly forgetful, extraordinarily lazy and inhumanly aloof. I also enjoy the occasional adverb.

I'm currently in college studying for a degree in Procrastination. I have the potential to go for the Masters I'm sure.

I'm  highly undependable but I try.

title: The Taste of Home
description:
Goat sucker. Overgrown lizard. Monster. Miguel is all too familiar with the many names humans have for chupacabras. As a member of a struggling pack, he knows how unfair the world can be to his kind. With their scaly bodies, sharp claws, and flesh-melting venom, it's no wonder humans fear them.

After Miguel protects a human from his pack leader at the only restaurant that caters to chupacabras, his life takes a turn for the strange when he is offered a job as a chef. Adapting to the culinary chaos soon becomes the least of Miguel's worries as he finds himself falling for Alejandro, an outspoken chef who treats him with more compassion than even his own kind. But what human would ever love a chupacabra?

With the restaurant struggling to stay afloat, inter-species tensions flaring, and Alejandro's ex serving as a constant reminder of what he can never be, will Miguel be able to take the heat, or will he be forced out of the kitchen?

Cover by @ShyGuySamurai

authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

title: Mateless and Luna Bound (Self Published)
description:
"I kinda like this human," Ed mind linked with them. "Can we keep him?"
"No!" They all said at the same time.
The black wolf shrank a little at their reaction, but there was still a glint of mischief in his gold eyes.
Max didn't keep his attention on his friend for long. His eyes were caught on the blond man that was in the middle of the clearing. The blond that had some how captured his heart without even trying. Those meadow eyes had gotten his attention without even looking his direction.
That was when Max knew he was his.
The next Luna to the Crescent Moon Pack was finally found after three long years of searching.
And it was a human.
A human man.
***
IN PUBLICATION! This is only the first twenty chapters of this story, as it's finally being published! See inside for more info!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a dreamer at heart who plans on manifesting my dreams as best I can. I hope you like my stories as much as I love writing them, because I dont think I'll ever stop.
What started off as one story to get a break from another novel, turned into inspiration and motivation to write a thousand more.
Hope you all enjoy!
Also, I started a Patreon, just in case some of you want to support me in a monetary way.
I do go back and edit my stories so they might not be completely in order as far as my series go. If you want to read any series that I make, check out my reading lists so you can read them in order! So far I have three series, but I'm planning on making plenty more along with a bunch of standalone's. All of my supernatural books belong to the same world, and I love adding Easter eggs to older stories or new ones that I plan on writing in the future. I'm also publishing the first series I've written. Due to this, the 'Mateless' series only has the first 20 chapters out, and I'm working on publishing book 2 of it in Spring or early Summer of 2023. The rest of my books will still be up for reading for free until I find the money to officially publish them. For my newest novels, they're going to take the longest to get published as I want to go in order for the most part. Follow me if you want updates on that!

title: To Be Tall...
description:
Keith Morgana has it all. The fame from his parents who are world renown, the looks that easily attract attention to himself, and not only that but Keith has the height that commands attention to himself without much effort. Keith has it all like looks, looking imposing and everything even if he were slumped shouldered. Being seven feet tall commands a lot of attention which is why Keith had it all, according to other people. The fame, the attention, the popularity that drew others to him without so much as a word from Keith who doesn't even need to lift a finger to get someone attracted to him. In a world of secondary genders with Alpha, Beta, and Omega with Keith who "had it all" with attractive looks from his parents and the height, Keith had the whole world in the palm of his hand. Omega's falling at his feet, Beta's being recessive just to chase after him, and Alpha's wanting to be him. Keith had it all...
Keith has little to nothing. Oh course, that's not really true since he lives with his very rich and renown parents, but Keith feels like he has nothing and will get nothing when it comes to mating for life with someone. How, you may ask? Keith has everyone chasing after him, wanting to be with him. He could take his pick of anyone around him. Except... Keith is not an Alpha. In fact, he's not even a Beta. Keith Morgana is an Omega, a recessive only secondary gender, that would rather be held then do the holding. Not only that but Keith has a type, which only made the whole "mate" idea even worse for him. Keith wanted someone taller, maybe with a little more muscle than him, and someone who would hug him close and love him with maybe a little bit of babying. But where was Keith to find that? Most of everyone chasing after him were recessive, not interested in him in the way he wanted, or definitely weren't taller than him which is what Keith really wanted above all else. 
College shall be very interesting for our main character. Stay tuned~

title: Falling for the Gun-Toting Accountant
description:
A no-nonsense IRS agent sent to investigate a family business for tax fraud finds it difficult to do her job when the suspect is so frustratingly adorable.
~~~A 2021 WATTY AWARD WINNER!~~~

                                                                      *****

 Summer Hong is good at her job. As a field agent for the IRS's criminal investigation division, she knows never to let things get personal. Her resolve is tested, however, when she meets the beguiling Holly Layton.

Holly loves Christmas, and loves the Layton Christmas Tree Farm even more. If only her father would take her seriously and let her play a bigger role in the company. Dealing with an IRS agent breathing down their necks isn't what she had in mind, though. Still, if she succeeds in somehow making the problem go away, maybe she'll finally get the recognition she deserves. But how do you get rid of a "problem" you secretly have a crush on?

title: Now You See Me
description:
Damien doesn't know who he is.

At least, he doesn't think he does.

When he wakes up on a beach with no recollection of when he got there, covered in scars and horribly confused, the last thing he needs to hear is that he isn't even human anymore. 

With the help of the inhabitants of St Martin's Rehab Centre for Supernaturals, and the clues provided by his mother and one photo album, he sets about trying to regain the memories he lost and unravel the mystery of the man he once loved. As his past starts to return to him and he realises the scale of his loss, the pieces of a gruesome puzzle start to fit together.

Something dangerous is lurking in the shadows, and it might just be after him.

ALL RIGHTS RESERVED S E Harrison (giveitameaning)

title: City Boy Rehab {ManxMan} [Complete]
description:
Alexander Beckett is a party animal and doesn't know anything about discipline or respect. With his father planing on stepping down and giving his position as CEO of a multi-billion dollar business to Alexander, he first needs to learn some respect and discipline. The only way Alexander's father thinks this will happen is if he sends him to his childhood best friends's ranch in Texas.

But Alexander needs more than just a three month rehab at a ranch. He needs to properly grieve for his mother and the only way for him to do that is to talk to his dad.

Alexander is given a week to prepare for his three month stay at the ranch. He isn't happy at all and goes to the ranch expecting to be pampered but instead he is bossed around by a cute country boy, Lee Williams. 

These two soon find a slight attraction to one another, only Lee is the one to try and ignore his feelings for Alexander.

In this City Boy Rehab feelings are discovered and others lost.

title: Whispers in the moonlight
description:
Emma is a teenage girl grappling with severe mental health challenges, including depression and loneliness, brought on by her parents' messy divorce and a strained relationship with her absent mother. One day, seeking an escape, she visits a coffee shop where she strikes up a conversation with Cate, a charismatic and intriguing woman. The two bond over casual conversation, and for the first time in a long while, Emma feels seen.

Unbeknownst to Emma, Cate is actually her new language arts teacher. When Emma walks into class she  realizes the truth, she's both stunned and conflicted. Cate, equally surprised but composed, handles the situation professionally but can't deny the unusual connection they share.

As the days pass, their dynamic becomes a complicated mix of tension and understanding. Cate pushes Emma to confront her struggles through writing and class discussions, while Emma wrestles with her feelings of vulnerability and anger. Their relationship evolves into a love-hate bond, marked by moments of intense connection and sharp conflict. Both women are forced to navigate uncharted emotional territory, questioning boundaries, trust, and the nature of the bond they've formed.

title: Coyote Wolf
description:
Naylan, an Alpha by birth, has always dreamed of running a pack of his own. Born into the busy city of Halifax, Nova Scotia, where city wolves run in small groups, and disregard communal living, Naylan had to pursue his dreams elsewhere - Toronto, a busier city, but with large enough outskirts to set up camp.

Hacking away at his ambition hadn't given Naylan enough time to think about other things like his potential mate, until Mavis, a half-bred coyote wolf living off the grid with his grandfather stumbled into his life.

title: Twelve Days of Christmas
description:
Ben is given a once in a lifetime opportunity.  To be one of the 12 Drummers Drumming in the Christmas charity single with the famous band Zaphire.  Ben expects the filming to last for one day.  He expects that he won't really be noticed by Luca Diego, lead singer and generally regarded as the sexiest man alive.  And he expects that after filming his life will go on as normal.

But somehow Ben ends up getting dragged into more filming, until he is persuaded to take part in every one of the twelve scenes, filming over 12 days.

12 days of being in the presence of Luca Diego

title: The Mermaid Queen [GxG]
description:
Victoria Stone, the Queen of all mermaids, is known for being like her name, stone cold. Hearing rumors of littering by the new family on her territory, she goes to check it out.

She is shocked to see a sweet, platinum-haired goddess cleaning up after her family. 

Adalee Evans, known as a ray of sunshine. She lights up a room the moment she walks in. She and her abusive dad move to a house on the waterfront when the last town got a whiff of what he was doing to her. 

At one of the parties where this alluring girl's dad requires her to wait on him and his friends, she sees something she shouldn't have. 

To protect the kingdom's secret, Victoria tries to erase the beautiful girl's knowledge of mermaids but is unexpectedly unable to. 

Leaving Adalee confused about what she thinks was a dream, she is determined to find out the truth. 

A story of a serious Queen and naïve girl, and how they collide in a sea of unexpected turns.

authorBio:
I was 16 when I started writing these books. I am now 20 and getting back into writing consistently. These stories need a lot of work that I can't dedicate time into, but I am writing new personal content and may publish updates on existing stories when I have the chance.

I'm currently updating 'Inspiring My Mate' as often as I can.

'Saving My Mate' is the first book I've ever written, and 'Tender Love' is a spin-off of it! You don't have to read 'Saving My Mate' to understand 'Tender Love!'

'Loving My Mate' is the sequel to 'Saving My Mate' and 'Bitter Love' is the sequel to 'Tender Love.'

'Inspiring My Mate' combines both series.

'The Mermaid Queen' and 'Frost and Flames' are in the same universe, and combine in the upcoming sequel.

'Tainted Innocence' and 'The Wanderer' combine in their sequel.

title: His Heart For Collection
description:
Leon is a waste collector. He collects waste from Leamington Enterprise and other commercial buildings. He's made friends in the  company, interacting with them whenever he comes to collect the waste twice a week.

He sometimes interacts with the CEO whenever he's available. Everybody knows that the CEO and Leon know each other, but from where and how, they don't know.

Leon is a married man, who left his husband, home and accounting job to distress. He found his solace in the waste collection industry, where he's made friends and has a peace of mind.

This is about his life and how he tries to navigate each day that comes, with a pestering husband that won't admit the wrong he's done and trying to win him back.

title: Little Brookie's Daddy. (DDLB , BXB, MPREG)
description:
Brooke Pierre. A boy whos life made him the way he am. Brooke comes from a abusive,bad household which caused him to develop little space. He has been aware of his little side since he was 16. He is good at hiding it, no one knows. Brooke has no friends and because hes scared to socialize. He lives in a  basement of his parents big mansion and gets treated poorly all because he is gay. He does not know many simple everyday things because his parents gave him no access to the outside world. He believes no one will love a freak like him, but all that changes when he somehow bumps into a man while running away.

Vincent Levough. A daddy dom and the most feared mafia boss in the U.S and Europe. He is known for his nice acts here and there but he is known for being deadly and cold when crossed. No one crosses him because they don't know what they will be getting into with a sadist like him. Vincent tried 1 committed relationship and after being used and cheated on for 3 years he promised to never love again. But will that change when he meets the most purest, sweetest, innocent boy known to man kind?

Looks like you have to read to find out!

title: ΩMEGA
description:
All his life, Kian has known nothing but trauma. As an omega, he was abused all his life and was told that he has one sole purpose: be used by others. He was taught to be silent, apologetic, and obedient. He's broken rules and paid the price yet still, he breaks one of the biggest rules his pack had set: Do Not Leave Without Alpha Permission. He and four of his closest friends manage to escape and while he was terrified at first, this huge action opens a door to a journey he could never imagine.

Beta Bridger never wanted to be a beta. He was destined to become one when he was born around the same time as his alpha, Arron. His entire life has been the shadow of his alpha; they are forced to be stuck together like glue. Despite this, he and Arron have entirely different viewpoints - some of which Bridger simply cannot agree with. He is tired of how things are and knows that if he were an alpha, he would dedicate his entire life to changing the system. He's tired of hearing about omegas dying at the hands of their pack, being abused, being tortured. He's done his research, he knows that omegas are important. But how can he make change when barely anyone agrees with him? He can't. At least, that was until he met Kian. They're meeting makes possible what many consider impossible:

He shows Kian the true purpose of being an Omega.

title: Food Courting
description:
In a war over the food court, an eager barista battles the confident competitor--and her own heart.

***

Young barista Cora Chun takes pride in being a Cool Bean, even after years without a promotion. So when Farron Kam, the younger assistant manager of the competing smoothie shop, flaunts her hatred for her job, Cora is determined to crush her to a pulp.

What she doesn't expect is for Farron to take her up on the challenge.

With that declaration of war, the two begin a battle over the food court: who can serve the most customers, who can close up the fastest, who can grab the last loaf of bread at the supermarket...

But as the rivalry begins to blend with romance, Cora has to decide if she is fighting a battle over beverages, or one over her own heart.

***

title: The Four of Us (GxG) (COMPLETED)
description:
Four brothers? Nah, four sisters. Four different lives, One story. 

Meet Alexandra Sofian Pendleton-Croft, the eldest. Just like their dad James Nicolai Pendleton, she's a pilot and currently doing her training on becoming the next CEO of the Pendleton International Airlines. With a beautiful fiancé beside her, what more can she ask for? 

Rohan Beatrix Pendleton-Croft or Brix as her friends like to call her. She's the black sheep of the family with a reputation for being the school playgirl. And as the certified schools' heartthrob, she can get any boy or girl she wants, right? Well, can she? 

Brianne Ghaille Pendleton-Croft the polar opposite of her sister Brix. She's taking a degree in medicine and hoping that maybe one day she'll take over the Croft General Hospital after their mother Sofia Croft. But before that, she's aiming to be the top of her class and it won't be that easy. 

And last but not the least, the youngest Jaimeson Dane Pendleton-Croft. She just started University and with her family's reputation in that school, can she live up to their expectations.

title: What If We Drown ✓
description:
Ashlyn hasn't spoken a word since the age of eight, and her heart's never felt more protected. But, when the confident and ever so charming Derek stumbles into her quiet little world, her emotions-and forbidden desires-have never been so loud. 

    *****

For twenty years, silence is all Ashlyn Holland has known. Haunted by the memories of her father, and the harrowing song of the ocean that stole him from her, Ashlyn maintains a safe distance from the rest of the world. Treading carefully the sea of fear and anguish that surrounds her, Ashlyn is determined to do all she can to protect her heart from such a tragic loss striking again.

In silence, she grieves.

In silence, she is safe. 

In silence, she finds the strength to breathe. 

But the silence can only last so long...

Derek Moreno is charming and devoted, and quick to see through every wall Ashlyn erects. With his arrival in town, defences fold and walls begin to crumble, the songs of her heart reaching new heights. 

Together, they crest twin tides of fate, the silence she'd once sought engulfed by his gentle touch, and the whispers of a love thought impossible. For the summer, Ashlyn welcomes the noise. The disruption.

But, the ghosts of Derek's past will no longer remain silent, and their deafening power has the potential to drag them both into a current strong enough to drown them amidst their heartache.

                       𝐁𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝟏 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐁𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
ARCHER's VOICE x TEN TINY BREATHS meet in this journey through grief and the different stages of healing, finding love once thought impossible, and rediscovering one's voice.

title: Catching Rainbows
description:
Luna falls for Chloe at first sight . . . literally, off a ladder. And it's the beginning of a beautiful friendship, after Luna gets past the fact that Chloe doesn't seem to be single.

They soon discover all the things they have in common, their time spent together a much-needed solace to both girls, and the feelings they develop for each other are undeniable.

It quickly becomes evident however that all is not as it seems; Chloe is in fact trapped in her farce of a relationship, and Luna vows to help her new friend escape the toxic situation and find her way back to herself.

title: His Advocate
description:
There were no words in any language that could describe the near savage yearning they both felt for one another. 
Curled up on thick, fur rugs, laying by a dying fire as the blizzard howled outside.
The demon prince ran his thumb across the boy's plump, rosy lips. An unstolen kiss hid in the corner of his smile.

"Such a wonderful temptation," He growled.

"I tempt you?" The red haired boy whispered, sweetly.

"My love, you intoxicate my reason. I have never wanted so deeply."



"Then have me."





19 year old Gabriel Harden, has gone through half of his life tormented over the memories he's lost. Alone in a big, quiet house, he tries his best to keep some level of normality. But it all takes a rather strange turn one fateful day. As if destiny was finally ready to reveal its smiling face to him in the most peculiar way.
He discovers a mysterious and beautiful man with horns lying beneath a tree, unconscious and fatally wounded. As they become more and more curious, attached and comfortable to one another, Gabriel begins to remember who he once was.

The importance this stranger once held to him.

And that their fates were entwined much deeper than either of them expected.



(All rights reserved. Be kind and enjoy.)

title: Elliot
description:
When Elliot moves into a charming city apartment, he's hoping for a fresh start. The light-filled space and quiet neighborhood seem like the perfect backdrop for building a new life. But on move-in day, he meets his next-door neighbors: Alec, the easygoing, friendly type who makes him laugh without trying, and Nate, his reserved but intriguing brother who seems harder to figure out.

As Elliot navigates settling into his new home, Alec's warm presence and Nate's quiet intensity create a mix of nervous excitement and unexpected connection. Over coffee runs, shared meals, and hallway conversations, Elliot begins to realize that this new chapter might hold more than just an escape from his past-it might lead him straight to his future.

With a sprinkle of humor, a dash of awkward charm, and plenty of heart, The story is about finding love in the most unexpected places-and discovering that sometimes, home is just a door away.

title: Call Me Vi | ONC 2024
description:
One is a journalist who writes about movie stars. The other is a movie star who hates journalists. Now their worlds are colliding.

Reagan Porter is a small town journalist married, in every sense of the word, to her work. When everything that could go wrong before her Valentine's Day vacation does, she jets off early to the mountains in Asheville, North Carolina for some well-earned peace and quiet. But she'll have to work for it.

Violetta "Vi" Dawson is bold, beautiful, and boisterous. At least, that's what the tabloids are calling her. Hoping to get away from the spotlight and her recent break-up with her long time boyfriend, Violetta seeks out The Bearside Hotel which she hopes will allow her some time away to think and reflect.

When the two meet after a drunken mishap, Reagan and Violetta immediately butt heads. How else are a journalist and a movie star supposed to get along? On a chance weekend, The Bearside Hotel might just offer each of them a chance at what they've really wanted all along: true love.

---
ONC Prompts:
9. After some long months of working harder than ever, you finally get to your well deserved vacation getaway but when you arrive at the hotel, there is this one star that brings all the paparazzi and trouble with them and makes your vacation one to remember.

24. A desperate wish, made from the heart, is always answered. Sooner or later.
---

title: Me & My Accidental Love (Boyxboy)
description:
Sequel To 'Me, My Step Brother & My Best Friend'

The year when Seth and Aaron were graduating, Sebastian summoned his courage and told Dominique about his feelings towards him, knowing that he has a girlfriend. However sadly for Sebastian, Dominique gave him a cold reply and Sebastian's heart were shattered.

A few years later this scene would still replay over and over again in his head, making him miserable, but he still makes the most of life. Now that he's in university, you'd think everything would be great and he would find a new love, if only life was so simple.

The university which Sebastian attends is also the one which Dominique attends too, so they see each other almost every other day around the campus. Sebastian never told anyone about his confession nor did Dominique, Sebastian tried to forget about him, but it isn't that easy.

So how will the story turn out for Sebastian? Will he have his love or will a new love enter?

title: A MEMORY OF YOU (SHORT STORY)
description:
Pon once loved someone deeply who was Sailub, a senior a year older than him. Despite Pon's unwavering affection, Sailub couldn't accept it. He didn't return Pon's feelings and, in fact, despised him. To Sailub, Pon's childish, attention-seeking behavior was irritating. Yet, Pon never gave up. He made Sailub breakfast, packed his lunch, showered him with gifts, and relentlessly pursued him, ignoring Sailub's clear disinterest.

Everything changed one day when Pon was involved in an accident right in front of their school. When Sailub heard the news, guilt consumed him. He decided to visit Pon with gifts as a gesture of remorse, to his shock, Pon no longer remembered him. The accident had taken away the part of Pon's memory where Sailub existed.

title: Silken Chains
description:
Alex moves to a small town seeking a fresh start, but his life takes a dark turn when he becomes entangled with Viktor, a wealthy and enigmatic man who lives in a secluded mansion. What begins as a passionate romance quickly spirals into a nightmare of control and abuse. Isolated from the outside world, Alex finds himself trapped within the mansion's walls, manipulated by Viktor's twisted sense of love.

As Viktor's control tightens, Alex struggles with the conflicting emotions of fear, dependency, and a love that refuses to die, even as it destroys him. He must find the strength to break free before he loses himself entirely to the darkness that has consumed his life. In this haunting psychological romance, the lines between love and captivity blur, leading to a harrowing battle for survival and self-identity.

title: Aristocrat | ✓
description:
Being sent off to serve the Viscount of Barcombe for two years to pay a debt would have been devastating for most, but not for Manfred. 

Manfred had built an attachment to Lord Evenus years before his servitude to him by watching him from a distance. Getting to be by his side day in and day out felt like he had won a prize. 

Lord Evenus is obliviously kind, charming, smart and as Manfred learned over time; a man of many secrets. The two become close over the course of many months, but Manfred remains curious about the Lord and his past. One question refused to stop plaguing him:

"What's in the west wing?"

title: Undercover (Boyxboy)
description:
My heart pulsated through my chest and I didn't think I could hold on for much longer. The frightening, terrorising feeling of his fingers slipping through mine was causing the arm that was gripping to the edge of the cliff to shake.

"Hold on, Harry! I've got you, I swear! Please, just hold on!" my voice held a shrill of terror to it and my eyes were filling with tears; tears of pain, frustration and sheer horror. 

Harry moved his gaze from our slipping fingers to my eyes. "It's okay, Ethan. Let go. You can't save me; not this time." I hated how calm his tone was. I hated how defeated he sounded. He had never given up - we always held hope for one another! We never gave up. 

"Don't you say that to me! Don't you fucking say that to me!" I roared, a small sob escaping my lips. 

Harry just smiled sadly, his muscular, beautiful body swaying in the harsh wind. The fall was so big; he would surely die of a heart attack before he hit the ground. I prayed to God he would.

No. 

I was breaking my own rule; I would not give up on him. Either both of us lived or neither of us would. My life would be over the second his ended, anyway.

title: Attitude. (MxM)
description:
When you're 18 you get told your 'Classification', it can be different things. Littles, caregivers, dom, sub, mistress, pet, master etc. Then you meet your 'match'. Meaning your soulmate.

Most people are excited to get their classification and soulmate.

But Vincent is not.

 Vincent Yasmins is a traumatised 18 year old boy, who has quite an attitude. He sneaks out to parties, gets in trouble a lot, drinks, smokes. All that shit. He can be sweet but he doesn't really care about others anymore.

Zander Towers is a 20 year old, who is respectful and sweet. His classification is a caregiver, and he was quick to learn a lot about it. He's quite strict and looks mean, but he's really a massive teddy bear.

title: You Of All People | A Nigerian Gay MM Love Story
description:
Folarin is sick of this. Every day, he wakes up to more fuel added to the idiotic
rumours that he and his best friend, Chuka are in a secret gay relationship.
It's ridiculous. Folarin has had actual interventions held over his chronic womanizing and Chuka gets in and out or more ships than Jack Sparrow.
The two of them are drowning in women. And the fact they happen to be two of the biggest stars in Nollywood, not to mention insanely handsome, certainly doesn't hurt the process.
But one blogger in particular, who seems to have a personal bone to pick with them, posts lie after lie while smoothly evading legal consequences.
She needs to be stopped.
So, as part of an elaborate plan to trap her, they decide to lean into it.
It would be controversial. It could be career suicide.
And it's a risk they're willing to take.

But what starts as acting for the cameras starts to stir up some very real emotions, and they - for the first time - start to wonder...

...if the world was on to something. 




....

"This." Folarin said, waving his hand back and forth between them. "I want to try."
Chuka cocked an eyebrow. "Being boyfriends?"
Folarin shut his eyes and let out a long-suffering sigh. "Yes. Being bo- . You fucking know what I'm talking about."
"And how exactly is that supposed to work?"
"Why wouldn't it?"
"For one thing, we're not gay."
Folarin shrugged. "How hard can it be?"
Chuka laughed through his nose. "I'm not sure that's how sexuality works, Folarin."



This isn't steamy like Brother in Lust but it's still a good read, I promise. :)
Enjoy.

title: Demon: Book 1
description:
-Demon Series: Book 1-
    
    Aden Perri has problems.
    	The last day of school his girlfriend calls it quits.
    	And proceeds to move on a little too quickly.
    	His friends disappear, leaving him to spend the summer alone.
    	His mother buys a dog. 
    	Aden hates dogs. The scar on his leg confirms it. 
    	And his new job titles are garbage collector and toilet scrubber.
    	At least he'll be out in nature, excepted he hates the outdoors.
    
    Aden's ready to barricade himself in his room, until school starts back up in the fall. His mother won't allow it, and his father is ready to do some character building. 
    	They drag him out and drive him to Beaver Lake. His father loads him with a bucket and a mop and sends him off to clean campground toilets. The local campers just laugh at the poor garbage boy wandered around picking up after them.
    	All but one. One very strange, shirtless, barefoot boy who Aden will never understand. But the boy makes it bearable, so he'll let him stick around. It's not like Titus is really going to give Aden a choice anyways.

title: Per Aspera (Ad Astra #2)
description:
Following the failed assassination of the Magnuvian royal family, Fetia and her family escape to Landiani, where they remain hidden for a few months to heal and strategize. However, when Fetia's mother decides to resume her assassination plan, Fetia realizes she can no longer stand by her mother and sister's side. Fetia decides to craft her own plan to gain her country's independence, one that won't incite more violence or put Princess Asteria in danger. Fetia flees from her mother and sister and begins to travel the expanse of the Magnuvian empire. Along the way, she forms close alliances and also meets familiar faces. Will she succeed in protecting both Princess Asteria and securing her country's independence, or will her mother and sister foil her plans and plunge the Magnuvian empire into even more chaos? Find out in the sequel to Ad Astra - "Per Aspera."

title: I Don't Mind
description:
[boyxboy] Adrian Sanders has had a crush on Derek Peterson for three years in high school. They played on the same side of the field, locking up any receivers that tried to get receptions on them. Adrian is the only person that knows that Derek is gay, but Derek doesn't know that, until Adrian sees something that will change their relationship completely.


WARNING: There are massive spoilers for Teammates With Benefits. If you don't want a book full of smut, then this book can kind of be read as a standalone, but I would not recommend it. There will most likely be smut, but this is going to be a slow burn. Homophobia will be way more present than it was in Teammates With Benefits. 

My updating schedule will be the exact same as it was for Teammates With Benefits. Every Monday and Friday at 7 AM PST/10 AM EST. This will be consistent throughout the entire book.

This book will probably be under constant editing, similar to Teammates With Benefits.

Again, the schedule of these football (American football) games will not be the same as it is in real life. In real life, college football ends in January, but in this book, games will go until May.

This is most likely not going to be the only sequel/spin off I write off of Teammates With Benefits. I'll see where all the characters are by the end of this book, decide if I want to or am at least motivated enough to write another book with these characters. I most likely will be.

description:
𝙁𝙖𝙢𝙤𝙪𝙨 𝙜𝙤𝙡𝙙𝙚𝙣 𝙧𝙚𝙩𝙧𝙞𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧 𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙧𝙗𝙤𝙮 𝙭 𝙊𝙗𝙨𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙥𝙨𝙮𝙘𝙝𝙤𝙥𝙖𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙘 𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙡𝙠𝙚𝙧

In the world of fame and fortune, young new star actor 𝐋𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐨 𝐀𝐥𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐭 has it all-charm, talent, and a legion of adoring fans, both men and women go weak in their knees whenever they catch the slightest glimpse of him. But beneath the glittering facade of red carpets and flashing cameras, darkness looms. When a mysterious admirer begins to shadow his every move, Leo's life takes a sinister turn. The notes start innocently enough, a compliment here, a word of admiration there, but soon they become something more-a chilling reminder that he's never truly alone. 

The stalker is closer than Leo could ever imagine, slipping into his life, his home, and his mind. Each note left behind is a haunting puzzle piece, drawing him deeper into a twisted game of obsession. As the lines between love and madness blur, Leo must uncover the identity of his tormentor before it's too late. But in a world where everyone wears a mask, can he really trust anyone, including himself?

title: Caught in Spider's Web (BoyxBoy)
description:
The society is dominated by them. They roam the streets, thinking that they own the world. Well, to be honest, they do own the world. We, humans, occupy inferior positions in the society while they hold the important ones. They have the high-powered jobs while the best that humans can do is to get menial jobs. They are gifted with power, wealth, and good-looks, so of course it makes sense if humans must bow down to them. Kiss their feet, worship the ground they walk on, let them do whatever they want with us, the lowly humans. 
  Don't let their crisp suit, their charisma, and their dazzling smile fool you. Behind all of them, there is a monster, lurking and waiting for the right time to pounce. 
  And to top it all, they snatch away anyone that they like, whether it's a girl or a boy, and stake a claim on that poor person in the most barbaric way. They bite them, and lock them away from other people. Other people think that it is okay for them to do that as they are the ones who keep our society from falling apart. They are the ones that bring peace in the world. So it's okay for them to basically kidnap a human as an exchange for the 'effort' that they give to save humans from destruction. 
  At least that's what they think. And unlike other humans, I'm going to change that.
  
  
  This is a boyxboy story, so don't like, don't read
